name: Cloak of Darkness
description: An enchanted cloak steeped in magical darkness.

name: Cloak of Speed
description: A mystical gray cloak once used by blackguard tricksters for flanking maneuvers and sneak attacks.

name: Cloak of the Night Thief
description: An exceptional cloak used by sorcerer-thieves for night operations in dockyards and storehouses.

name: Cloak of the Red Agent
description: A powerful cloak used by master spies to infiltrate the most tightly guarded fortresses.

name: Cloak of Endless Twilight
description: A powerful cloak woven from the shadows of twilight.

name: Cloak of Ghostly Concealment
description: An eldritch cloak of the afterworld which grants invisibility by enveloping its user in death itself.

name: Cloak of Nightmares
description: A moonwoven cloak worn by slayer cults who spill the blood of emperors in their abhorrent mission to create a new order.

name: Cloak of Bloody Surprises
description: Many Rogues have tried to use this to escape their asylum. All have failed.

name: Cloak of Bloody Surprises Shiny
description: Many Rogues have tried to use this to escape their asylum. All have failed.

name: tD Cloak
description: A bulky cloak ill-suited for stealth, but can provide the wearer with great offensive capabilities.

name: tD Cloak Shiny
description: A bulky cloak ill-suited for stealth, but can provide the wearer with great offensive capabilities.

name: Cloak of Eerie Trepidation
description: A cloak that makes one's skin crawl with the dread of its short-lived former owner.

name: Refraction Cloak
description: This heavy cloak cleverly conceals its user not by magic, but by channeling the light around them as camouflage. Tampering with this light briefly projects a false mirror image of oneself.

name: Refraction Cloak Shiny
description: This heavy cloak cleverly conceals its user not by magic, but by channeling the light around them as camouflage. Tampering with this light briefly projects a false mirror image of oneself.

name: AoOCloak
description: A firm cloak worn by Oryx's stealth agents to assist in quiet takedowns. It doubles as protection for any compromised situation.

name: Cloak of the Deep
description: An enchanting cloak that conceals its wearer in a veil of iridescent bubbles. The shimmering cascade of bubbles serves as the only lifeline within the sea's deepest hadal trenches.

name: Cloak of the Mad God
description: A pitch black cloak enhanced with the defensive strength of Oryx's own signature armor.

name: Cloak of the Mad God Shiny
description: A pitch black cloak enhanced with the defensive strength of Oryx's own signature armor.

name: Cloak of the Planewalker
description: An enchanted cloak crafted by an ancient guild of timeshifter thieves.

name: Cloak of the Planewalker Shiny
description: An enchanted cloak crafted by an ancient guild of timeshifter thieves.

name: Cloak of Winter
description: A snug cloak crafted by a band of seclusive snowthieves to help pilfer riches and disappear into the heart of winter.\n\nSprite Credits: Dappertron

name: Eggshell Cowl
description: Work smarter not harder.

name: RogueST1
description: Woven from the skin of a ghast, Skuld's ability to freely shift between the mortal and spiritual plane is linked to this cloak's unusual fabric.

name: Hydroflow Cloak
description: A cloak made of a magically contained waterweave, the flowing waters obscure the wearers movement from onlookers.

name: Mirror Cloak
description: A brilliant cloak that utilizes the complex process of light reflection to perfectly conceal its user by creating an exact replica, mimicking the wearer.

name: 3RogueST1
description: The Spectre Cloak shrouds the user in a wavering veil of spirit-light that blurs their outline and mutes their presence. While enveloped in this ghostly mantle, they slip through hostile gazes and glide between moments as if half-forgotten by the living world.

name: 2RogueST1
description: A dark and flowing cape donned by masters of the twilight hours.

name: Bronze Helm
description: A bronze-plated lieutenant's helm, effective for invigorating the fighting spirit of nearby allies.

name: Black Iron Helm
description: A captain's helm of distinctive black iron, capable of inspiring great courage.

name: Red Iron Helm
description: A major's helm of ornate red iron, made to arouse fearlessness among the troops.

name: Steel Helm
description: A well-made commander's helm of steel with silver filigree, able to inspire gallantry in large numbers of troops.

name: Golden Helm
description: A golden field marshal's helm with platinum detailing and a cockatrice plume, able to motivate entire legions to new heights of tenacity and determination.

name: Helm of the Great General
description: A steel and platinum helm of ancient design, worn by earthrazer generals during the great orcish war.

name: Helm of the Tribune
description: An ashen helm of regal grandeur, whose wearers have upraised the greatest legions and inspired total domination.

name: Adamantine Helm
description: A masterpiece of craftsmanship, this full helm was forged in the fires of the volcanic abyss infusing its metal with a regenerative ability.

name: Adamantine Helm Shiny
description: A masterpiece of craftsmanship, this full helm was forged in the fires of the volcanic abyss infusing its metal with a regenerative ability.

name: Amber Encrusted Helmet
description: Decorated with ancient amber, this helmet's idle solitude over many years have caused its abilities to dwindle.

name: Amber Encrusted Helmet Shiny
description: Decorated with ancient amber, this helmet's idle solitude over many years have caused its abilities to dwindle.

name: HWarriorST1
description: The Lycanthrope, with beastly mane!

name: Bubblegum Bucket
description: No one would dare question your dominance of the Hunting Grounds while wearing the remains of a decapitated gumball machine.

name: 3WarriorST1
description: This once held potatoes. Now it can barely hold back his rage.

name: Challenger Helm
description: It's not easy being the best. Some wish for more, a way to inflict difficulties on themselves so that they may once again experience what it's like to not be insultingly overpowered. At last, there is a way.

name: WarriorST1
description: The last piece of the Taming ritual requires a man to be bound to a Dragon. Wizards were able to link a man to a Dragon's spirit using magic and pain. Using its powers comes with a great cost.

name: AoOHelm
description: A helm forged in the deepest depths of Oryx's realm. Those who wear it are said to feel a dark power coursing through their veins.

name: Helm of the Jack-o'-naut
description: This unorthodox helm was created by carving out a pumpkin that is found only in the darkest pumpkin patches. Donning this cursed piece of equipment is said to cause the wearer to fly into a fit of rage.

name: Helm of the Juggernaut
description: This helm was forged of metal that fell from the sky.  It is strangely light and emits a faint hum.

name: Helm of the Juggernaut Shiny
description: This helm was forged of metal that fell from the sky.  It is strangely light and emits a faint hum.

name: Helm of the Juggernaut Shiny - Midas
description: This helm was forged of metal that fell from the sky.  It is strangely light and emits a faint hum.

name: Helm of the Swift Bunny
description: Made from the remains of a violent bunny, whoever wears this helm is given the magical ability to hop as fast as a bunny!

name: EH Hivemaster Helm
description: A nefarious helm combining pheromones and Killer Honey to captivate Killer Bees into servitude.

name: EH Hivemaster Helm Shiny
description: A nefarious helm combining pheromones and Killer Honey to captivate Killer Bees into servitude.

name: Hydroflow Helm
description: A bluesteel helm that grants the wearer strength as immense as the greatest typhoon.

name: Pathfinder's Helm
description: A finely sculpted helm worn by commanders of the northern realms, its enormous display of regal antlers make their authoritative presense known in the chaos of war.\n\nSprite Credits: Dappertron

name: Tipsy Topper
description: This stylish felt cap has found itself at the helm of many tavern brawls, and atop the heads of many poor decision makers.

name: Tipsy Topper Shiny
description: This stylish felt cap has found itself at the helm of many tavern brawls, and atop the heads of many poor decision makers.

name: 2WarriorST1
description: Pirate captains wear extravagant cocked hats to both inspire their men and intimidate their foes.

name: Vanguard's Visage
description: A dreadfully heavy barbute, prominently featuring inward curving horns. Such a trait has been considered taboo for eons, further marking the age of this design.

name: Vanguard's Visage Shiny
description: A dreadfully heavy barbute, prominently featuring inward curving horns. Such a trait has been considered taboo for eons, further marking the age of this design.

name: Vanguard's Visage (Rehearsal)
description: A dreadfully heavy barbute, prominently featuring inward curving horns. Such a trait has been considered taboo for eons, further marking the age of this design.

name: Oakwood Lute
description: A sturdy lute made of finely cut oakwood.

name: Iron Lute
description: A special lute given to apprentice musicians to compose their finest ballads.

name: Silver Lute
description: A polished lute built for combat against undead menaces.

name: Battle Lute
description: A lightweight lute designed to project strong sounds across the chaos of battlefields.

name: Regal Lute
description: An immaculate lute granted to the appointed bards of wealthy rulers as their travel companions.

name: Skyward Lute
description: A misty lute created by the exalted songweavers in their task to awaken the wind deity Shu.

name: Nebular Lute
description: A mysterious lute of dark matter, capable of playing joyous songs even in the oppressive sound void of space.

name: BardST1
description: A resplendent trumpet used to signify the coming of the end times, prophesied to sound their most glorious note at the opening of the seventh seal.

name: AoOLute
description: Chief Beisa personally made this decorated horn to produce a deep, booming sound, rallying troops and sending signals to coordinate unrelenting assaults.

name: Ghost Ship's Bell
description: An ancient ship's bell encrusted with dried deep kelp and bearing obscure sigils of forgotten, underwater gods. Its peals can summon fish to defend the bearer, but at what cost?

name: Hydroflow Singing Glass
description: Ancient merfolk bards would seldom use the lute, instead preferring the gentle resonance of vibrating waves.

name: HBardST1
description: Forged in the hot lavas of the abyss, this pick has a dark influence over the player. The more they play, the stronger the possession becomes.

name: Joker Timbrel
description: A unique and enchanted musical instrument, specifically associated with the playful and mischievous nature of jokers.

name: Legion Elite Drums
description: Beats of war that rally allies and demoralize the unprepared.

name: Lullaby
description: A soothing crescent-shaped instrument known to relax one's body and mind when played, lowering their guard and making oneself drowsy. Only its player can hear the quiet melodies, sure to have them counting sheep in no time.

name: Motivational Megaphone
description: A faintly magical device used by Griefkeeper Zole to amplify his own voice throughout the Penitentiary's cell branch. Peculiarly, speaking into it warps any attempts at encouragement into toxic insults.

name: Motivational Megaphone Shiny
description: A faintly magical device used by Griefkeeper Zole to amplify his own voice throughout the Penitentiary's cell branch. Peculiarly, speaking into it warps any attempts at encouragement into toxic insults.

name: Noble Mandolin
description: Endless melodies from this fine instrument once filled the halls of the castle. It is without any apparent wear, yet even the most upbeat tune sounds somber when it is played.

name: Noble Mandolin Shiny
description: Endless melodies from this fine instrument once filled the halls of the castle. It is without any apparent wear, yet even the most upbeat tune sounds somber when it is played.

name: Noble Mandolin (Rehearsal)
description: Endless melodies from this fine instrument once filled the halls of the castle. It is without any apparent wear, yet even the most upbeat tune sounds somber when it is played.

name: Oryxmas Carol
description: A golden voice can inspire as much as any instrument.

name: Pharaoh's Requiem
description: An unusually crafted lute with an ancient style of construction, meant to produce soothing sounds of deep sleep and keep wrathful gods dormant.

name: Pharaoh's Requiem Shiny
description: An unusually crafted lute with an ancient style of construction, meant to produce soothing sounds of deep sleep and keep wrathful gods dormant.

name: Piper's Pan Flute
description: A peculiar instrument used by rat hunters of yore to lure rodents to their demise.

name: 3BardST1
description: This ancient totem pulses with the echoes of long-departed guardians. When summoned, it channels ancestral wrath through blessed flame.

name: Snake Charmer Pungi
description: A ceremonial pungi that contains the spirits of fifteen snakes, guiding the righteous through their many paths ahead.

name: Snake Charmer Pungi Shiny
description: A ceremonial pungi that contains the spirits of fifteen snakes, guiding the righteous through their many paths ahead.

name: Taiko Drums
description: The drum whose every beat carries with it the energy and rhythm of Kaguya. A mortal sounding this mystical instrument bears both order and disarray.

name: The Triangle
description: Although quite simple, its sound is unmistakable. This isn't just any triangle.

name: 2BardST1
description: Baneful beats of this waist-worn instrument rile the skies, invoking the occluded power of the storm.

name: Wavecrest Concertina
description: A rather peculiar instrument played by the sailors of the seven seas. Its music has the unique property of attracting parrots that will obey the musician's every command.

name: Wavecrest Concertina Shiny
description: A rather peculiar instrument played by the sailors of the seven seas. Its music has the unique property of attracting parrots that will obey the musician's every command.

name: Ritual Mace
description: A mace which materializes mystical creatures to support in combat.

name: Disciple Mace
description: A gleaming mace capable of powerful summons for those who are experienced in the magical arts.

name: Specialist Mace
description: A decorated mace of high status, signifying achievement in advanced summoning styles.

name: Adept Mace
description: An imposing mace built specifically for battle application, staggering foes with its intimidating design.

name: Monarch Mace
description: A majestically grand mace used in royal courts as a show of formidable might.

name: Sovereign Mace
description: An opulent mace built of dense nightmatter and enchanted to harness the power of the infinite void for unspeakably powerful summoning.

name: Grandmaster Mace
description: A supremely dominant mace of faultless design, capable of manifesting entire armies in the astral wars.

name: SummonerST1
description: Development of this compact M.E.R.V. took an explosive turn.

name: Big Berdtha
description: A mace capable of channeling the skills of one of Bilgewater's most prolific gunslingers.

name: E2SummonerST1
description: Enemies who dare face its sweet wrath will quickly learn that the chocolate they once craved is now their undoing.

name: Crystal Mace
description: Small particles of energy visibly buzz around inside the glistening crystals of this mace.

name: Crystal Mace Shiny
description: Small particles of energy visibly buzz around inside the glistening crystals of this mace.

name: Dragon Mace
description: Small particles of fire energy visibly buzz around inside the fiery eyes of this mace.

name: HSummonerST1
description: Now fated to perpetuate the Banshee's curse, the Summoner wielded power over lesser spirits.

name: Hivemind Mace
description: The guiding power of the realm's pollinating drones. Even when stolen from their proper queen, it can still briefly influence their minds to service.

name: Hydroflow Mace
description: This rare and little known mace can call forth a ravenous vortex.

name: Incubation Mace
description: Easter celebrations call for eggs, but Oryx's strict regulations on anything that might be a chicken makes eggs risky. This mace mimics the functions of an egg to summon pre-grown rabbits, with exactly the personality you'd expect from an animal raised by a weapon.

name: Incubation Mace Shiny
description: Easter celebrations call for eggs, but Oryx's strict regulations on anything that might be a chicken makes eggs risky. This mace mimics the functions of an egg to summon pre-grown rabbits, with exactly the personality you'd expect from an animal raised by a weapon.

name: Mace of the Celestial Forest
description: Limon's power of nature restoration are infused into this mace for her children to wield, traversing the realm and planting seeds of new life in the wake of wanton destruction.

name: Mace of the Celestial Forest Shiny
description: Limon's power of nature restoration are infused into this mace for her children to wield, traversing the realm and planting seeds of new life in the wake of wanton destruction.

name: Mace of the Depths
description: This formerly ordinary mace was twisted by Arachna's son after plucking it from a hapless victim. Though he has no reason to use it himself, some believe the Son of Arancha keeps it as reminder to his kin to not cross him as he did his mother.

name: Mace of the Depths Shiny
description: This formerly ordinary mace was twisted by Arachna's son after plucking it from a hapless victim. Though he has no reason to use it himself, some believe the Son of Arancha keeps it as reminder to his kin to not cross him as he did his mother.

name: Mace of the North Pole
description: The bitter cold of the realm's most frigid point is encased in this mace's handle, channeling the temperature to summon a creature hardy enough to endure such conditions.

name: Mace of the Pumpkin Effigy
description: A sinister twist on the scarecrow's intended use. Totalia bewitched these cursed figures with an uncanny allure to enthral victims into their untimely demise.

name: 3SummonerST1
description: An arboreal cudgel fashioned from the heart of an Elder tree. Mages intune with nature can unleash it's full potential, summoning an entire forest in moments.

name: AoOMace
description: A wicked mace constructed by Dr. Terrible to impose the Mad God's will. It stands as one of Oryx's greatest attempts at merging magic and technology.

name: Minotaur Mace
description: Easter celebrations call for eggs, but Oryx's strict regulations on anything that might be a chicken makes eggs risky. This mace mimics the functions of an egg to summon pre-grown rabbits, with exactly the personality you'd expect from an animal raised by a weapon.

name: Peacekeeper
description: A veritable artifact from the forgotten splendor of a kingdom none wish to remember. No matter the craftsmanship of its gilded design, this unwelcome sight is now only a sobering reminder of a mistake without regret.

name: Peacekeeper Shiny
description: A veritable artifact from the forgotten splendor of a kingdom none wish to remember. No matter the craftsmanship of its gilded design, this unwelcome sight is now only a sobering reminder of a mistake without regret.

name: Peacekeeper (Rehearsal)
description: A veritable artifact from the forgotten splendor of a kingdom none wish to remember. No matter the craftsmanship of its gilded design, this unwelcome sight is now only a sobering reminder of a mistake without regret.

name: Recursion Mace
description: A self-obsessed summoner's failed attempt at creating infinite armies.

name: 2SummonerST1
description: To fabricate colossi from within the earth is a rare and enviable practice, often deemed sacred. The creations of this club-like mace are too brittle for the interest of certain parties, but the proven potential is a precious thing indeed.

name: Suspension Orb
description: An orb that temporarily shackles enemies to another plane.

name: Imprisonment Orb
description: An orb used by starwizards to bind their demonic opponents.

name: Neutralization Orb
description: A glowing orb of pale emerald, used to constrain rogue elementals to the astral mists.

name: Timelock Orb
description: A powerful orb of flawless sun quartz, created by dark thaumaturgists of the nether kingdoms.

name: Banishment Orb
description: An orb of pure diamond, shining with an eerie blackness and thirsting to consume the life essence of mortals.

name: Planefetter Orb
description: An orb of astral amethyst, crystallized beneath the titanic mountains of the earth plane and used to secure dangerous creatures in distant realms.

name: Dimensiongate Orb
description: An anomalous orb utilized by the astralmancers to banish demons who rose against them into a timeless void.

name: Command Cornea
description: The incredibly thick cornea taken from the eye of Overseer Oculon. It bears an immense hunger for magical energy, and will devour its user's entire mana pool in the blink of an eye.

name: 3MysticST1
description: A glassy projection of arcanic lights provide an accurate chart of the stars beyond the Realm. Through a careful process of measurement and divination, one can travel along ley lines of starlight to reach worlds unknown.

name: Enchantment Orb
description: The crystalline glass in this orb seals away an ancient flora said to rejuvenate the spirit and unleash one's force of will against those who threaten the wild.

name: Enchantment Orb Shiny
description: The crystalline glass in this orb seals away an ancient flora said to rejuvenate the spirit and unleash one's force of will against those who threaten the wild.

name: Vindication Orb
description: A depraved aura of malignance exudes from this relic. Once protected within the great tombs of the desert, Nefret unearthed this treasure to prevent it and many others from falling into the hands of the Legion.

name: Hydroflow Orb
description: A seaglass orb mystics can use to ensnare their targets in an aquatic prison.

name: Karma Orb
description: What goes around comes around.

name: Legion Elite Orb
description: Manipulates reality with disciplined chaos, disrupting the rebellion's formations.

name: Orb of Aether
description: This Orb creates a concentrated area of energy. The energy is so dense at its core that foes are paralyzed.

name: Orb of Aether Shiny
description: This Orb creates a concentrated area of energy. The energy is so dense at its core that foes are paralyzed.

name: Orb of Conflict
description: This orb of ancient bloodstone has a dark reputation of twisting those who wield it.

name: Orb of Conflict Shiny
description: This orb of ancient bloodstone has a dark reputation of twisting those who wield it.

name: Orb of Conflict - Chaos
description: This orb of ancient bloodstone has a dark reputation of twisting those who wield it.

name: AoOOrb
description: Oryx's sentries use these cursed orbs as their watchful eyes, maintaining and enforcing the Mad God's constant rule across the realm.

name: Orb of Sweet Demise
description: A magical honeycomb that was once crucial in repelling an assault from the Hornet Rebellion.

name: Orb of Sweet Demise Shiny
description: A magical honeycomb that was once crucial in repelling an assault from the Hornet Rebellion.

name: Orb of Terror
description: This orb has been imbued by Skuld with the energy of the lost souls wandering her Cemetery.

name: HMysticST1
description: A crystal ball known to be able to summon magically constructed bats, but this technique has only been mastered by Totalia's kind.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Primal Arcana
description: This deeply profaned magitech haunts those who bear it with distant, unending screams. One's conscience must be far beyond all reason to use its tremendous and varied powers without vacillation.

name: Primal Arcana Shiny
description: This deeply profaned magitech haunts those who bear it with distant, unending screams. One's conscience must be far beyond all reason to use its tremendous and varied powers without vacillation.

name: Primal Arcana (Rehearsal)
description: This deeply profaned magitech haunts those who bear it with distant, unending screams. One's conscience must be far beyond all reason to use its tremendous and varied powers without vacillation.

name: 2MysticST1
description: A young enchantress used a rare flame-absorbing stone to capture the lava spirits.

name: Snowbound Orb
description: A skillfully decorated snowglobe that is actually a warlock's sinister tool of inquisition, imprisoning foes in a realm of infinite winter.\n\nSprite Credits: Dappertron

name: MysticST1
description: All shall know my power. Not even the Mad God can stop me.

name: Vision of Draconis
description: As the heavens decreed, the age of dragons came swiftly to an end. Yet the gaze of the mighty watch intensely over the world, waiting for the power of Draconis to rise once again.

name: Vision of Draconis Shiny
description: As the heavens decreed, the age of dragons came swiftly to an end. Yet the gaze of the mighty watch intensely over the world, waiting for the power of Draconis to rise once again.

name: Spider Venom
description: Magically concentrated venom of the carnivorous leaping tree spider.

name: Pit Viper Poison
description: Deadly magical poison taken from the two headed pit snakes of the underworld.

name: Stingray Poison
description: Lethal aquatic poison extracted from the glands of the magical demon ray.

name: Felwasp Toxin
description: Magically refined poison of the rare and dangerous felwasp.

name: Nightwing Venom
description: Magically enhanced venom of the savage nightwing dragon.

name: Baneserpent Poison
description: Concentrated, lethal venom of the winged ethereal baneserpent.

name: Necrofish Poison
description: The oceanic Necrofish's highly noxious poisons, secreted from its spines to befoul entire swaths of the seas.

name: Bottled Lemonade
description: A sour drink not just for refreshment, splash your enemies with citrus power straight from the bottle!

name: Bottled Medusozoan
description: A youthful jellyfish taken from the reefs of the ocean realms, residing within a coralglass jar.

name: Bottled Medusozoan Shiny
description: A youthful jellyfish taken from the reefs of the ocean realms, residing within a coralglass jar.

name: Crystallised Fang's Venom
description: Even in small amounts, this potent venom is capable of corroding the armor of its victims.

name: Cursed Canopic Jar
description: An intricately crafted vessel, usually used to store the preserved internal organs, but this one seems to contain a cursed diety.

name: Holly Poison
description: The bitter poison of evergreen berries that has also absorbed a great deal of energy from evil spirits.\n\nSprite Credits: Dappertron

name: Hydroflow Poison
description: A brackish concoction of seawater and assortment of piscine venoms, inflicts debilitating pain on those unfortunate enough to taste its sting.

name: Legion Elite Poison
description: Precision-crafted toxin designed for silent elimination behind enemy lines.

name: Lightning in a Bottle
description: A misguided attempt by Xolotl to grant a form of his power to followers among the Secluded Thicket, with the glaring weakness that it can only be utilized in large, open areas with direct access to the clouds.

name: 3AssassinST1
description: Fully functional, but barely keeping itself together, users of this blowpipe benefit greatly from its powerful sting.

name: Mighty Stein
description: A mighty mug for a mighty drink! Be merry!\n\nSprite Credits: Dappertron

name: Mighty Stein Shiny
description: A mighty mug for a mighty drink! Be merry!\n\nSprite Credits: Dappertron

name: Murky Toxin
description: A deadly substance concocted with ingredients found in the sewers.

name: Murky Toxin Shiny
description: A deadly substance concocted with ingredients found in the sewers.

name: Pandemic Poison
description: A specially engineered concoction containing a modified plague virus, allowing the direct infection of a victim's soul. Although it can infect over a massive area, the particular lack of lethality makes it seem incomplete.

name: Pandemic Poison Shiny
description: A specially engineered concoction containing a modified plague virus, allowing the direct infection of a victim's soul. Although it can infect over a massive area, the particular lack of lethality makes it seem incomplete.

name: AssassinST1
description: Swarming cells fill this jar, prepared to bind to whatever may foolishly approach them.

name: Plague Poison
description: A foul poison harvested from the corpses of plague victims. It infects many targets, but kills slowly.

name: Plague Poison Shiny
description: A foul poison harvested from the corpses of plague victims. It infects many targets, but kills slowly.

name: Polarity Poison
description: A perfectly concentrated blend of elemental forces, primed to diverge into an explosive result if the seal is ever broken. This flawless balance is believed to be the key to a still greater power.

name: Polarity Poison Shiny
description: A perfectly concentrated blend of elemental forces, primed to diverge into an explosive result if the seal is ever broken. This flawless balance is believed to be the key to a still greater power.

name: Polarity Poison (Rehearsal)
description: A perfectly concentrated blend of elemental forces, primed to diverge into an explosive result if the seal is ever broken. This flawless balance is believed to be the key to a still greater power.

name: Pollen Incendiary
description: A diabolical fusion of magic and chemical warfare engineered by Dr. Terrible in his effort to subjugate the Nest. When unleashed, it triggers a cataclysmic chain reaction between the charged volatile pollen that engulfs the air in a blinding and roaring inferno.

name: Poison of MotMG
description: A rusty barrel once used for transporting a revolting toxin across the seas. One spilled drop is enough to cause a crew to jump ship with no regard for their own lives.

name: Spirit's Bane
description: A strange ectoplasmic concoction that can inflict its blight on living and ethereal alike.

name: AoOPoison
description: Oryx demanded his alchemists make a poison capable of killing more rapidly to satisfy his impatience. The resulting brew proved rather explosive.

name: 2AssassinST1
description: Exposure to this ferocious concoction is so intensely lethal that it acts instantaneously. Its deceptively small vial allows for easy use.

name: Deception Prism
description: A devious magical prism that creates an illusory ally.

name: Illusion Prism
description: An infiltrator's prism used by eldritch spies to create diversions behind the battle lines.

name: Hallucination Prism
description: A mind-affecting prism that creates powerful psychic illusions.

name: Prism of Figments
description: A glittering magical prism that fabricates potent images in the minds of the weak-willed.

name: Prism of Phantoms
description: A prism of the underworld that harnesses dark energy to implant noncorporeal psionic beings into the minds of onlookers.

name: Prism of Apparitions
description: A deep blue prism of sun cut topaz, used by doppelganger spies to aid in their vile missions of assassination and murder.

name: Prism of Reveries
description: A scintillating prism of duplicity, infiltrating the deepest corners of the mind to awaken phantasmic entities that embody hatred and fear.

name: 3TricksterST1
description: The death throes of a powerful demigod remain sealed within the crystalline exterior, but are briefly unleashed as the soul desperately attempts to cling onto life, pulling onto the life force of nearby souls only to strengthen its prison further.

name: Ase's Echo
description: A fragmented prism that is constantly mending its cracks and refracturing. Pulling pieces apart can create an unstable link between two spaces as the prism tries to become whole again.

name: Ase's Echo Shiny
description: A fragmented prism that is constantly mending its cracks and refracturing. Pulling pieces apart can create an unstable link between two spaces as the prism tries to become whole again.

name: TricksterST1
description: A fragment of a brain from a lesser golem. Its strength indicates it came from a Golem of Anger.

name: Vindication Prism
description: This brilliant diamond exhibits a peculiar agitation to exposure beyond the waters. It was plundered by the Pirate Queen herself from depths far deeper than the open seas, as it was believed to be the boon of an ancient oceanic deity.

name: 2TricksterST1
description: A glorious artifact, bestowed upon mortals from Daeva warriors. Emulating their altruistic goals, this prism can forge countless fighters from the pure lights of the heavens.

name: Echoes Prism
description: A fragmented prism that is constantly mending its cracks and refracturing. When agitated, it ejects volatile shards towards the source until each fragment spirals back into equilibrium.

name: Fool's Prism
description: All that glitters is not gold. Beware, tricksters who choose this dastardly prism must be committed to their cruel prank.

name: Fooled Prism
description: All that glitters is not gold. Beware, tricksters who choose this dastardly prism must be committed to their cruel prank.

name: Gambler's Fate
description: A coin pilfered from the endless vault of Gemsbok's hoarded wealth. Only the most daring would stake their lives on the equal odds of a coin flip.

name: Gambler's Fate Shiny
description: A coin pilfered from the endless vault of Gemsbok's hoarded wealth. Only the most daring would stake their lives on the equal odds of a coin flip.

name: Ghostly Prism
description: A cursed piece of Davy Jones' treasure. Using it leaves behind a deadly spirit bomb.

name: Ghostly Prism Shiny
description: A cursed piece of Davy Jones' treasure. Using it leaves behind a deadly spirit bomb.

name: Heart of Gold Prism
description: It's said that love lasts three years... this angel didn't get the memo.\n\nSprite Credits: Lovens

name: Hydroflow Prism
description: This seaglass prism can refract light in changing forms, creating illusions as if they were reflected by the ocean's surface.

name: Legion Elite Prism
description: Projects disciplined illusions, confounding enemies with strategic misdirection.

name: Ornamental Prism
description: A brilliantly shining prism of berylstone, cut to resemble a tree topper as a means of hiding eidolon agents in plain sight.\n\nSprite Credits: Dappertron

name: Prism of Dancing Swords
description: This prism has a deep flaw that causes it to scatter light in two directions.

name: Prism of Dancing Swords Shiny
description: This prism has a deep flaw that causes it to scatter light in two directions.

name: Prism of Dire Instability
description: Seemingly bleak at first, this prism has erratic magical properties looming inside, which affect the light it scatters in unforeseen ways.

name: Prism of Dire Instability Shiny
description: Seemingly bleak at first, this prism has erratic magical properties looming inside, which affect the light it scatters in unforeseen ways.

name: AoOPrism
description: This prism's light-storing ability makes it essential equipment for Oryx's recon squad, granting them unmatched efficiency in any scenario.

name: Prismimic
description: The perfectly cut head of a Prismimic, dastardly agents of the Crystal Entity. Its copying abilities are unprecedented.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: HTricksterST1
description: The innards of a pumpkin were molded into this pile that vaguely resembles a prism. Used only by the laziest scarecrows who feel the need to outsource their job.\n\nSprite Credits: Bonk, Aurum

name: The Heart of the Dragon
description: Legend has it that this precious gem is the crystallized essence of a fierce dragon's heart, imbued with the ancient magic that flows through the veins of these titanic creatures.

name: Reinforced Quiver
description: An enchanted quiver made of high-quality leather and brass.

name: Iron Quiver
description: A strong quiver of magical iron.

name: Elvencraft Quiver
description: A powerful enchanting quiver made by forest elves.

name: Magesteel Quiver
description: A superior enchanting quiver made of high quality magesteel.

name: Golden Quiver
description: A quiver that shines with gold and pulses with the power of elvish archer spirits.

name: Quiver of Elvish Mastery
description: A forestcloth quiver of highest quality, exhibiting exceptional magic powers and used by the foremost masters of Elven archery.

name: Quiver of the Autumn King
description: A sun iron quiver passed through a royal elven lineage, whose legendary skills in archery have protected the forest kingdoms for millennia.

name: Archerang
description: A quiver once treasured by a highly sentimental archer who just couldn't bear to part with her arrows forever. They've become rather dull after so much recycling.

name: EH Yellow Quiver
description: A quiver crafted from the remains of a yellow Beehemoth, filled with razor-sharp arrows fashioned from Killer Bee stingers.

name: EH Red Quiver
description: A quiver crafted from the remains of a red Beehemoth, filled with razor-sharp arrows fashioned from Killer Bee stingers.

name: EH Blue Quiver
description: A quiver crafted from the remains of a blue Beehemoth, filled with razor-sharp arrows fashioned from Killer Bee stingers.

name: EH Green Quiver
description: A quiver crafted from the remains of a Green Beehemoth, filled with razor-sharp arrows fashioned from Killer Bee stingers.

name: EH Yellow Quiver Shiny
description: A quiver crafted from the remains of a yellow Beehemoth, filled with razor-sharp arrows fashioned from Killer Bee stingers.

name: EH Red Quiver Shiny
description: A quiver crafted from the remains of a red Beehemoth, filled with razor-sharp arrows fashioned from Killer Bee stingers.

name: EH Blue Quiver Shiny
description: A quiver crafted from the remains of a blue Beehemoth, filled with razor-sharp arrows fashioned from Killer Bee stingers.

name: EH Green Quiver Shiny
description: A quiver crafted from the remains of a Green Beehemoth, filled with razor-sharp arrows fashioned from Killer Bee stingers.

name: Brine Quiver
description: Arrows placed in this quiver become encrusted with a layer of sea salt, and turn into augurs of seawater when fired.

name: Coalbearing Quiver
description: A giant sock-like quiver woven from elventhread, concentrating evil energy into a lump of coal to create powerful arrows.\n\nSprite Credits: Dappertron

name: Cocoon Quiver
description: A silky case of arrows woven by Mama Megamoth's larvae for use by her woodland warriors.

name: Cocoon Quiver Shiny
description: A silky case of arrows woven by Mama Megamoth's larvae for use by her woodland warriors.

name: Double Vision Darts
description: A finely crafted leather bound quiver containing many small darts. The reduced size of the arrows in this quiver allow a specific firing pattern, confusing their target as if they were seeing double.

name: Double Vision Darts Shiny
description: A finely crafted leather bound quiver containing many small darts. The reduced size of the arrows in this quiver allow a specific firing pattern, confusing their target as if they were seeing double.

name: 2ArcherST1
description: After fending off men made of clay, I discovered a lamp that might fetch a considerable sum at the market.

name: Freezing Quiver
description: Corrupted by creatures of the frost realms, its arrows will slacken assailants promptly.

name: E2ArcherST1
description: As the wind whispers through the morning air, it strikes with both elegance and intent.

name: Interregnum Quiver
description: One of the more peculiar pieces of the Wanderer's enchanted arsenal; this quiver has the unique ability to call forth a magical arrow storm, but channeling such power requires the caster's utmost concentration.

name: Hydroflow Quiver
description: A quiver filled with Aquamarine tipped arrows that summon the force of the tides on impact.

name: Legion Elite Quiver
description: Harnesses the refined precision of Legion Elite training, launching piercing shots that embody tactical mastery and relentless discipline.

name: AoOQuiver
description: Oryx's most versatile bowmen receive javelin training, requiring a steady hand and perfect focus to inflict devastating damage.

name: Q.U.I.V.E.R.
description: Firing from this quiver uniquely applies the force of the bowstring as potential energy, which is then overcharged and converted to kinetic energy for a delayed, yet intensely powerful release.

name: S.H.I.N.Y. Q.U.I.V.E.R.
description: Firing from this quiver uniquely applies the force of the bowstring as potential energy, which is then overcharged and converted to kinetic energy for a delayed, yet intensely powerful release.

name: Quintessential Quiver
description: Royal alchemy techniques have enabled this quiver to sharpen the gilded tips held within. Arrows loosed from the case are recognized as some of the sharpest objects known to man.

name: Quiver of Dazing Love
description: It truly is dazzling when you put your heart into the work!\n\nSprite Credits: WunderWafe

name: Quiver of the Shadows
description: A mysterious quiver formed of corruption and dark matter. Its ethereal existence creates a small implosion of nearby atmosphere when drawn.

name: Quiver of the Shadows Shiny
description: A mysterious quiver formed of corruption and dark matter. Its ethereal existence creates a small implosion of nearby atmosphere when drawn.

name: ArcherST1
description: A quiver not meant for the corporeal realm. When used by a mortal, it creates a momentary rift between death and life, briefly releasing the chilling screams of the lost.

name: Quiver of Thunder
description: This strange quiver was created in a forgotten age by a lost tribe of Dark Elves.

name: Quiver of Thunder Shiny
description: This strange quiver was created in a forgotten age by a lost tribe of Dark Elves.

name: Quiver of Thunder - Overcharged
description: This strange quiver was created in a forgotten age by a lost tribe of Dark Elves.

name: 3ArcherST1
description: Turretsmiths innovate new automated defence measures to help protect the Steamworks, from rapid firing cannons to multiple flails attached to a spinning post.

name: Sinister Syringes
description: A chilling metal container filled with miscellaneous medical instruments coated in poison. Its syringes require blood as a catalyst, taking a considerable toll on both victim and user alike.

name: 3OArcherST1
description: Cute snow decorations able to come to your defence and aid you in battle with their dangerously cold artillery.

name: HArcherST1
description: The sternum of a long deceased adventurer. It releases a shriek when fired, making enemies shake and shudder in surprise.\n\nSprite Credits: Tero, Aurum

name: Discharge Scepter
description: A steel-and-ruby scepter that blasts electrical arcs.

name: Thunderclap Scepter
description: A powerful scepter imbued with the energy of astral storms.

name: Arcblast Scepter
description: A glittering golden scepter charged with magical lightning.

name: Cloudflash Scepter
description: A golden scepter of power, created by storm giants during their long war against the undertrolls.

name: Scepter of Skybolts
description: A commanding scepter of authority, wielded by cloud titan nobles from the elemental plane of air.

name: Scepter of Storms
description: An ancient druidic scepter created by the nature gods themselves, embodying all the fury of the megacosm.

name: Scepter of the Firmament
description: An azure scepter of elemental dominion, wielded by the sky charioteers to command the natural order of the overlands and the orchestration of astral bodies.

name: Tezutsu Hanabi 2
description: A collection of gilded fireworks, personally granted from Umi's showstopping stockpile. Locals believed they held the power to ward off evil spirits, whilst bringing peace and prosperity to its celebrants.

name: Cnidaria Rod
description: An intricate scepter of unfathomable power containing the electric fluids of a jellyfish behemoth.

name: Cnidaria Rod Shiny
description: An intricate scepter of unfathomable power containing the electric fluids of a jellyfish behemoth.

name: SorcererST1
description: A scepter that can be evoked to unleash overwhelmingly powerful blasts upon others. Even the most crazed scientists wouldn't use this scepter without taking note of its side effects.

name: HoneyScepter
description: Stolen from the Queen Bee herself, this scepter possesses the power to destroy evil.

name: HoneyScepter Shiny
description: Stolen from the Queen Bee herself, this scepter possesses the power to destroy evil.

name: Honey Scepter Supreme
description: After years of the truth being rejected by the masses, this version of the fabled Honey Scepter is automatically enhanced with the full potential it had all along.

name: Hydroflow Scepter
description: This scepter channels the power from storms of the high seas, capable of capsizing even the mightiest vessels.

name: 2SorcererST1
description: This enchanted cane adds pizzazz to any battle! The cleverly engineered lighting effects inside become stronger for a bigger audience.

name: HSorcererST1
description: Anyone caught in the blast of this item find themselves longing for a lost love, a yearning which Incubi find delicious.

name: Parrot Skeleton Scepter
description: This parrot was struck by lightning while perched in the crow's nest.  It has remained rigid and crackling with chained power to this very day.

name: pD Scepter
description: A loathsome scepter that converges the life energy of parasites into a soul-rotting bolt of destruction.

name: pD Scepter Shiny
description: A loathsome scepter that converges the life energy of parasites into a soul-rotting bolt of destruction.

name: Scepter of Fulmination
description: This scepter's blast is so powerful it will slow opponents.

name: Scepter of Fulmination Shiny
description: This scepter's blast is so powerful it will slow opponents.

name: Scepter of Rust
description: This electrical rod is actually used to remove rust from machine parts through electrolysis. When used on a living or artificial creature however, the shock causes muscles to tense and circuits to go haywire, reducing the assailant's power.

name: Scepter of Rust Shiny
description: This electrical rod is actually used to remove rust from machine parts through electrolysis. When used on a living or artificial creature however, the shock causes muscles to tense and circuits to go haywire, reducing the assailant's power.

name: Scepter of Sainthood
description: A holy shepherd's hook that creates sacred light to guide the innocent to salvation.\n\nSprite Credits: Dappertron

name: Scepter of the Transgressor
description: This scepter is an instrument of blatant heresy, twisted and carved from anathematized elderwood.

name: AoOScepter
description: First assembled as a combat modification to Treasurer Gemsbok's gilded scepter, this artifact consumes substantial magical energy to detonate a chaotic blast.

name: Scepter of MotMG
description: A brooding scepter used to protect a recluse tribe of lightning worshipers from outsiders.

name: Tezutsu Hanabi
description: These fireworks are a mere fraction of Umi's spectacular stockpile. Locals believed they held the power to ward off evil spirits, whilst bringing peace and prosperity to its celebrants.

name: 3SorcererST1
description: Summons static Totems that discharge electrical bolts around it. The totem’s rapid fire makes it a formidable static defense.

name: Seal of the Pilgrim
description: A seal of holy providence and mortal virtue.

name: Seal of the Seeker
description: A holy seal of godly protection, shimmering with divine might.

name: Seal of the Aspirant
description: A seal of blessed preservation, gleaming with the sacred will of the righteous.

name: Seal of the Divine
description: A consecrated seal of the heavens, shining with divine brilliance and godly power.

name: Seal of the Holy Warrior
description: A hallowed seal of the immortal divine, sanctified by the pious and used since ancient times to inspire great numbers of crusading warriors.

name: Seal of the Blessed Champion
description: A holy seal of heavenly omnipotence, given to aid mortal warriors in their fight against chaos and darkness.

name: Seal of Invocation
description: A jubilant seal of celebration, granted to the most righteous crusaders as they challenge the evergrowing threat of demonic legions.

name: 2PaladinST1
description: A mystifying sigil from an otherwordly domain. The power sealed within causes it to faintly pull at its surroundings, attempting to draw them into the void.

name: Advent Seal
description: A sacred seal of the bitter Frost Kingdoms, bearing a wreathlike design that invokes a symbol of strength and endurance in the midst of winter.\n\nSprite Credits: Dappertron

name: E2PaladinST1
description: Shield yourself with sweetness, and let your cakes do the rest.

name: Doom's Emblem
description: An accursed sigil that beckons to one's inner demons. Unholy paladins can unleash their dormant latent potential by forming a pact with an otherworldly force through a tribute of their own flesh and blood.

name: Hydroflow Seal
description: A seal blessed by oceanic priests allowing the user to beseech the gods of the sea for power.

name: Legion Elite Seal
description: A seal of iron command, forged by the Shadow Legion to impose unwavering discipline and bolster their ranks with oppressive might.

name: Marble Seal
description: A seal made from the Marble Colossus' head. The power of a pure and mighty paladin still remains within.

name: Marble Seal Shiny
description: A seal made from the Marble Colossus' head. The power of a pure and mighty paladin still remains within.

name: HPaladinST1
description: Paladins must take an oath of righteousness to obtain their titles. Those who defect are considered deeply cursed.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Sandstone Seal
description: Created to guide the spirits of the desert, this seal has infused itself with their energy over many years. This spiritual energy affects living creatures in unconventional ways compared to normal practices.

name: Sandstone Seal Shiny
description: Created to guide the spirits of the desert, this seal has infused itself with their energy over many years. This spiritual energy affects living creatures in unconventional ways compared to normal practices.

name: Scholar's Seal
description: A symbolic seal gifted to the most renowned philosophers of ancient times.

name: Scholar's Seal Shiny
description: A symbolic seal gifted to the most renowned philosophers of ancient times.

name: Seal of Blasphemous Prayer
description: A seal that is said to briefly borrow the power of the Gods themselves.  Some Paladins shun its dark power, others embrace it.

name: Seal of Blasphemous Prayer Shiny
description: A seal that is said to briefly borrow the power of the Gods themselves.  Some Paladins shun its dark power, others embrace it.

name: tD Seal
description: A seal granting the user access to other dimensions, though the means by which this is accomplished are unknown.

name: tD Seal Shiny
description: A seal granting the user access to other dimensions, though the means by which this is accomplished are unknown.

name: Seal of Eternal Life
description: The fruit of over a decade of research, this blessed seal at long last overcomes all limitations on its usage and never allows its user to run out of strength. A slight concession had to be made by devoting one hundred percent of its magic resources back into magic.

name: AoOSeal
description: Given to Oryx's most esteemed gladiators, this twisted artifact is capable of focusing all of the wearer's strength into a single blow, mirroring the Mad God's own fighting style.

name: PaladinST1
description: Protect the helpless, embolden the heroic, slow the progress of evil. - Inscription, in Fae.

name: 3PaladinST1
description: To whom this symbol belonged, and what it may have represented, remains a mystery. It serves as a grim reminder of the world unobserved, cloaked in the endless snow.

name: Timber Sheath
description: A dependable sheath carved of petrified wood, with a finely curved slot to optimize draw force.

name: Vineland Sheath
description: A meticulously crafted sheath built of stretched vines and parallel blades of grass for a smoother blade release.

name: Haze Sheath
description: A curious sheath designed to evoke the effortless flow of clouds and fog.

name: Ichor Sheath
description: A fierce sheath made to spill the blood of gods, briefly filling the wielder with a beastly aggression when a blade is drawn.

name: Serpentine Sheath
description: An elegant teal sheath with masterful snake etchings both inside and out, amplifying the momentum of a swift strike from the hip.

name: Great Shinobi Sheath
description: An extravagant gilded sheath which was once the heirloom of a distant clan, a now extinct bloodline whose intricate weapon arts remain in practice.

name: Sonic Wave Sheath
description: A marvelous sheath of inimitably brilliant constitution. Drawing one's blade from within emits a furious sonic wave, propelling the weapon beyond its known limits.

name: An Ancient's Embrace
description: Crafted by a soul newly ensnared in the clutches of darkness, its design invoked memories of the fiery wrath of the god of chaos

name: AoOSheath
description: Swift, ruthless, and a perfect encapsulation of Oryx's militia. Vicious aggression to overwhelm one's enemies has been the Mad God's tactic of choice since the day he earned his title.

name: Elegant Parasol
description: The ornate umbrella carried by the gracious Miko. It never goes out of fashion, regardless of the season.

name: Hydroflow Sheath
description: A delicate yet masterful sheath embodying the secret technique of the wave dash.

name: Irradiance Sheath
description: Believed to be some kind of artificial organ, this sheath embeds the weapon in a solid crystal coating before violently fracturing into shrapnel when drawn.

name: Kaiken
description: Still believing himself a monk, Daichi knew an open blade contrasts his superficial rank. Yet he could not bear to abandon his wicked material weapon, and so he forever concealed it with this sheath.

name: Shiny Kaiken
description: Still believing himself a monk, Daichi knew an open blade contrasts his superficial rank. Yet he could not bear to abandon his wicked material weapon, and so he forever concealed it with this sheath.

name: Labyrinth Dweller's Sheath
description: The Woodland Labyrinth is a lamentable example of mortal meddling in the ways of nature, a harsh reality its occupants are keenly aware of. A sheath like this, fully embracing their own ways of life, is no doubt a bitter expression of dissent.

name: Labyrinth Dweller's Sheath Shiny
description: The Woodland Labyrinth is a lamentable example of mortal meddling in the ways of nature, a harsh reality its occupants are keenly aware of. A sheath like this, fully embracing their own ways of life, is no doubt a bitter expression of dissent.

name: Legion Elite Sheath
description: A darkly ornate sheath, relic of a fallen clan extinguished by the Shadow Legion, preserving deadly secrets of forgotten martial rites.

name: KenseiST1
description: Masters of swordsmanship recognize how much can be learned from the flow of the ocean's waves.

name: Paper Machete
description: An advanced flight test disguised as an arts and crafts project, or so its inventor continues to believe.

name: 2KenseiST1
description: This sheath can be a great tool in the hands of an experienced Kensei.

name: Quartermaster Scabbard
description: A foreign sheath stolen from unknown lands by the crew of Davy Jones. Now phantoms, the headstrong ghost pirates have misused this delicate instrument as a rapier holder, twisting its effects with their chaotic ways.

name: Quartermaster Scabbard Shiny
description: A foreign sheath stolen from unknown lands by the crew of Davy Jones. Now phantoms, the headstrong ghost pirates have misused this delicate instrument as a rapier holder, twisting its effects with their chaotic ways.

name: S.H.E.A.T.H.
description: This lightwave blade is carefully attuned to madness harmonics in a revolutionary attempt to remotely blast any region with the fury of the F.E.R.A.L.'s energy attack.

name: S.H.E.A.T.H. S.H.I.N.Y.
description: This lightwave blade is carefully attuned to madness harmonics in a revolutionary attempt to remotely blast any region with the fury of the F.E.R.A.L.'s energy attack.

name: Vindication Sheath
description: This sacred blade may be unsheathed in the blink of an eye to produce a catastrophic blast of lightning. Such a tool is used by Izel to bring fervor and great respect to the many gods of the thicket.

name: Snowman's Sheath
description: A glacial seal consumes any weapon held within, solidifying a layer of permafrost to enable smoother draws with the elegance of falling snow.

name: Volcanic Sheath
description: Archdemon Malphas took a conspicuous liking to this outsider's sheath, smuggled in by a newly demonic soul. Perhaps its design reminded him of something?

name: Volcanic Sheath Shiny
description: Archdemon Malphas took a conspicuous liking to this outsider's sheath, smuggled in by a newly demonic soul. Perhaps its design reminded him of something?

name: Iron Shield
description: A shield made of well forged iron.

name: Steel Shield
description: A shield made of high quality steel.

name: Reinforced Shield
description: A steel shield supported by iron ribbing.

name: Golden Shield
description: An ornate but strong shield plated with gold.

name: Mithril Shield
description: A very strong shield made from the strongest and most desirable of all metals.

name: Colossus Shield
description: A superior shield forged in deep armories for the construct armies of the underworld.

name: Shield of Orcish Regalia
description: A mighty shield smithed in the burning rivers of the demonic realms to grant the right of sovereignty over the brutal Orclands.

name: AoOShield
description: In contrast to Oryx's personal equipment, this lightweight shield is too small to stagger an opponent. It is instead covered in jagged metal to shred targets.

name: Cavalry Lance
description: A resplendent, gilded lance once wielded by a legendary horseback rider of yore during the great Draconic Cataclysm. Its formidable reach could slay monstrous dragons with seemingly impenetrable bodies by impaling their deeply buried hearts.

name: KnightST1
description: This almighty shield was specially designed to protect its owner from a bombardment of attacks in all directions. Although feared today, it once stood as a reminder of Oryx's glory in an era long forgotten.

name: Crystal Shield
description: An ornately decorated buckler made from an array of crystalline stone. It is too frail to swing around, but it can somehow grow and mantle its wielder in a heavy crystal armor that releases shards upon receiving trauma.

name: Crystal Shield Shiny
description: An ornately decorated buckler made from an array of crystalline stone. It is too frail to swing around, but it can somehow grow and mantle its wielder in a heavy crystal armor that releases shards upon receiving trauma.

name: Dragon Slayer
description: As the Dragon Slayer shield is carried into battle, it serves not only as a bulwark against the wrath of dragons but also as a symbol of hope for those who stand against the opposing forces.

name: Esoteric Buckler
description: A shield from a place beyond the gates of war and peace.

name: Hydroflow Shield
description: A bluesteel heater shield rimmed with aquamarine gemstone, the wielder is able to strike their enemies with the force of a tsunami.

name: Kogbold Cower Shield
description: A large sheet of plating intended to be used as a blast shield in explosives testing. When confronted with intruders some of the more cowardly Kogbolds choose to use them to protect themselves while fleeing.

name: Legion Elite Shield
description: A fortified shield forged in the abyssal forges of the Shadow Legion, built to withstand the fury of rebellion and enforce the will of their dark empire.

name: Onyx Shield of the Mad God
description: A pitch-black shield looted from the depths of Oryx's Castle.

name: Oryx's Escutcheon
description: An enormous shield decorated with the crest of Oryx, an infamous symbol of oppression dreaded across the realm.

name: Oryx's Escutcheon Shiny
description: An enormous shield decorated with the crest of Oryx, an infamous symbol of oppression dreaded across the realm.

name: Resounding Shield
description: An enormous, brazen shield taken from an ancient belfry, long believed to have been enchanted by centuries of ringing for angelic favor.\n\nSprite Credits: Dappertron

name: Shield of Flowing Clarity
description: This shimmering shield allows knights to enhance their concentration on targets, giving them more time to think about their next move in battle.

name: Shield of Flowing Clarity Shiny
description: This shimmering shield allows knights to enhance their concentration on targets, giving them more time to think about their next move in battle.

name: Shield of Jawgmur
description: This skull-adorned shield was created to commemorate the Skeleton Kings with the wealth of many spare jaws at their distal phalanges.

name: Shield of Ogmur
description: This massive shield was created for the wealthy and powerful Ogre kings as a sign of their unrivaled strength.

name: Shield of Ogmur Shiny
description: This massive shield was created for the wealthy and powerful Ogre kings as a sign of their unrivaled strength.

name: Shield of Pogmur
description: As the heavy armor worn by most knights typically conceals their faces with a stoic expression, they require other ways to convey emotions of shock or excitement.

name: Ship's Wheel Shield
description: How can something with so many holes in it be useful in defence? By spinning it so quickly nobody can strike you through the holes, of course!

name: 3KnightST1
description: Imbued with the untamed power of the Mighty Minotaur, this shield leaves a feeling of despair and no escape to those unfortunate enough to be in it's presence.

name: Snake Skin Shield
description: A shield made of snake skin stretched across a rigid frame.

name: Shiny Snake Skin Shield
description: A shield made of snake skin stretched across a rigid frame.

name: Spiteful Scutum
description: A shield from a place beyond the gates of war and peace.

name: Spiteful Scutum Shiny
description: A shield from a place beyond the gates of war and peace.

name: Spriteful Shield
description: This magical shield was built by a tribe of mysterious forest people called the Eggre.\n\nSprite Credits: Piggby

name: 2HKnightST1
description: Despite the bright colorful star on this buckler, when sunlight hits this shield one is able to see it's history of blood and battle scars hidden in plain sight.

name: 2KnightST1
description: Recovered from the wreckage of a Viking ship, this large buckler can strike unlike any other shield. It can sustain the force of its strike in the air itself, uniquely constructed to mimic the Viking tale of Thielief the Steadfast catching a relic suspended in the air during a raid of saintly territory.

name: Four-Point Star
description: A ninja-star with four razor-sharp points.

name: Spiral Shuriken
description: A ninja-star with curved spiraling blades.

name: Silver Star
description: A beautifully crafted shuriken.

name: Wind Circle
description: A sacred shuriken that embodies the power and speed of the wind.

name: Ice Star
description: A mystical shuriken formed from ever-frozen ice.

name: Doom Circle
description: An ancient weapon that spells destruction for all who oppose its master.

name: Dynastic Star
description: A heraldic shuriken of the ancient royal family, revered for its astonishingly lethal edge after generations of use by a mighty eastern empire.

name: Ballistic Star
description: To dominate the battlefield, Beisa's assault units possess this star model to remain vigorous in combat before controlling zones with its independent throwing arcs.

name: Ballistic Star Shiny
description: To dominate the battlefield, Beisa's assault units possess this star model to remain vigorous in combat before controlling zones with its independent throwing arcs.

name: Clover Star
description: Use that clover to impress the ladies.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Combcutter Kunai
description: Shaped from the stingers of mutant beehemoths, these blades are sealed away until the very moment of combat and brandished by the finest of shinobee.

name: 2NinjaST1
description: These kunai were chiseled as an experimental weapon by the mineral monsters lurking far beneath the realm's surface.

name: NinjaST1
description: Circle of sunlight\nEmpowers a fragile bloom\nAnd scours the world.

name: HNinjaST1
description: Designed for carving and also used to create bolts of thunder, smiting those that oppose justice.

name: Eternal Star
description: A delicately engraved gem that captures the light of timeless love.

name: Hanagasaku
description: Bloomed from Belladonna's Garden, this plant has grown into a lethal weapon through its disc shape and exceptionally sharp petals. Its seeds fly off when thrown, quickly spreading itself through the surrounding area.\n\nSprite Credits: TLMaelstrom

name: Hydroflow Star
description: A handheld swirling vortex of water, its strike contains the force of a raging hurricane.

name: Igneous Starblossom
description: It is believed that astral stardust landed during the Primal Era, giving life to these now-extinct flowers that adapted to any environment they bloomed from. Consecrated by the infernal spirits of old, these artifacts now serve as a token of friendship with the elementals of the deep earth.

name: Igneous Starblossom Shiny
description: It is believed that astral stardust landed during the Primal Era, giving life to these now-extinct flowers that adapted to any environment they bloomed from. Consecrated by the infernal spirits of old, these artifacts now serve as a token of friendship with the elementals of the deep earth.

name: Ilex Star
description: A razor-sharp arrangement of holly plants that has been enchanted to vanquish spirits of darkness.\n\nSprite Credits: Dappertron

name: 3NinjaST1
description: An ancient scroll inscribed with an incantation to summon the wrath of the gods.

name: Kagebooshi
description: These delightfully social spirits are willing to part for a swift scare, but they won't dare venture too far from their owner!

name: Kageboshi
description: Imbued with haunting energies of a foreign rite, the layered blade of this shadowy tool is never finished with its victim.

name: Legion Elite Star
description: A deadly projectile of concentrated chi, launched with elite discipline.

name: Midnight Star
description: Legends speak of a star touched by Horizon that pierces through the light of the heavens. As eons passed, the caged tyrant sharpened broken scales like razorblades, imbuing his hatred as inky black darkness to forge a dark myth into reality.

name: Midnight Star Shiny
description: Legends speak of a star touched by Horizon that pierces through the light of the heavens. As eons passed, the caged tyrant sharpened broken scales like razorblades, imbuing his hatred as inky black darkness to forge a dark myth into reality.

name: Overwhelming Axehead
description: An extremely heavy axehead salvaged from Griefkeeper Zole's rather bulky choice of weaponry. Throwing it takes a tremendous amount of effort, but it has the capacity to obliterate everything in its path.

name: AoOStar
description: Oryx's unseen strikers wield these serrated claws for precise and deadly slashes to make an example out of the Mad God's most hated adversaries.

name: Spider Shuriken Shiny
description: An arachnid star which slings silk to tangle predators while granting oneself the speed and stamina of Arachna's most agile young.

name: Spider Shuriken
description: An arachnid star which slings silk to tangle predators while granting oneself the speed and stamina of Arachna's most agile young.

name: Star of Enlightenment
description: A perfectly cut crystal encasing light from the oldest stars in the universe. All who hold it are filled with a sense of peace and concentration.

name: Star of Enlightenment Shiny
description: A perfectly cut crystal encasing light from the oldest stars in the universe. All who hold it are filled with a sense of peace and concentration.

name: Vindication Star
description: Once nameless tools of an oni warrior, these blades have witnessed the bloodshed of a thousand lives lost to Oryx. They carry the whispers of a long-sought vengeance against the Exalted One.

name: Unshuriken
description: A star with high potential, but curses the user with a crippling lack of decisiveness.

name: Breathtaker Skull
description: A dwarven skull desecrated by foul enchantments.

name: Heartstealer Skull
description: An elvish wizard's skull, defiled with life-stealing necrotic spells.

name: Soul Siphon Skull
description: A holy paladin's skull, fouled by depraved incantations of necromancy.

name: Essence Tap Skull
description: A lesser demon's skull, empowered and amplified by dark enchantments of the underworld.

name: Lifedrinker Skull
description: A powerful demon skull permeated with unspeakably horrific sorceries.

name: Bloodsucker Skull
description: The skull of a vampire lord, further desecrated with the depraved magics of soul thievery.

name: Mindwaster Skull
description: A horrendously debauched martyr's skull that has been brought to ruin by foul enchantments of the sulfurous realms.

name: 2HNecroST1
description: Able to reanimate any slain foe still spiteful from their defeat, if one were to accumulating all this enchanted blood then it too will act on its own.

name: Brain Cube
description: The oldest forms of automatic computing built by the Kogbolds were a far cry from the self improving artificial intelligence of the modern Core designs. Though its computation capabilities are lost to time, the matrix remains conveniently effective at distributing powerful surges of energy.

name: Brain Cube Shiny
description: The oldest forms of automatic computing built by the Kogbolds were a far cry from the self improving artificial intelligence of the modern Core designs. Though its computation capabilities are lost to time, the matrix remains conveniently effective at distributing powerful surges of energy.

name: Cracked Crystal Skull
description: A relic uncovered from the depths of the jungle. It exudes a deep darkness.

name: Cracked Crystal Skull Shiny
description: A relic uncovered from the depths of the jungle. It exudes a deep darkness.

name: Crossbones Skull
description: Some say this skull is the model used in the original Jolly Roger, but that seems a little unlikely.  It is still super powerful, whatever the truth.

name: 2NecroST1
description: The angular remains of a cube. It can be temporarily resurrected through the dark arts.

name: AoOSkull
description: The charred remains of an ancient demon ruler once killed by the Mad God. Oryx's wicked spellcasters have cursed it with the ability to resurrect and control demons.

name: Epiphany Skull
description: The skull of an enlightened philosopher who understood the true potential of necromancers to be summoners. Tragically, his overwhelmingly high IQ got the best of him.

name: Ever Green Skull
description: This skull was left behind, infused within the bed of flowers in the floral realms. Now fully bloomed and ready for battle, capable of aiding it’s flower friends.

name: HNecroST1
description: A skull haunted by the chilling breath of a reanimated killer. The number 66 is strangely carved on one side.\n\nSprite Credits: TLMaelstrom

name: Hydroflow Skull
description: An eternally dripping skull of the drowned, its unholy energies can summon the souls of those who met their fate in the depths.

name: 3VNecroST1
description: This mask belongs to a cult of love worshippers, they believed that bringing everyone together in sync as one would open up new heights of strength through the power of love.

name: Maw of Malignance
description: Deep within the blood, cartilage, and twisted bone lies the cranium of a once-human victim.

name: Maw of Malignance Shiny
description: Deep within the blood, cartilage, and twisted bone lies the cranium of a once-human victim.

name: NecroST1
description: I found a great spectre floating above me. He reached out and granted me his cranium.

name: Perennial Cranium
description: A flora-infested skull from one of Belladonna's victims. It exchanges the life force it steals into plant life, blooming powerful vegetation.\n\nSprite Credits: TLMaelstrom

name: Perennial Cranium Shiny
description: A flora-infested skull from one of Belladonna's victims. It exchanges the life force it steals into plant life, blooming powerful vegetation.\n\nSprite Credits: TLMaelstrom

name: 3NecroST1
description: The skull of an alligator, used to house spirits summoned through wicked rituals.

name: Sealed Crystal Skull
description: An undamaged version of a well known archaeological artifact, radiating a potent dark energy. This rare find is coveted by many explorers.

name: Sealed Crystal Skull Shiny
description: An undamaged version of a well known archaeological artifact, radiating a potent dark energy. This rare find is coveted by many explorers.

name: Skull of Corrupted Souls
description: The cursed skull of a corrupted mind. Good intentions can go horribly wrong.

name: Skull of Corrupted Souls Shiny
description: The cursed skull of a corrupted mind. Good intentions can go horribly wrong.

name: Skull of Endless Torment
description: This skull glows with the stolen soul of a phoenix trapped in the skull many years ago by Shaitan.

name: Skull of Endless Torment Shiny
description: This skull glows with the stolen soul of a phoenix trapped in the skull many years ago by Shaitan.

name: Skull of Krampus
description: A monstrous skull hewed with incantations of darkness to absorb life energy from the souls of the wicked.\n\nSprite Credits: Dappertron

name: Skull of Restless Souls
description: An unnaturally pristine skull adorned with a crown of thorns. Various parts of this once holy figure continue to be worshipped as sacred relics post-mortem as they bestow graces and miracles through the traces of divine power abiding within.

name: Skullish Remains of Esben
description: The skull still seems to contain some of the Void Entity's power.

name: Flame Burst Spell
description: A dangerous spell that summons green fire from the astral plane.

name: Fire Nova Spell
description: A deadly spell created by goblin sorcerers to subdue their orcish enemies.

name: Scorching Blast Spell
description: A formidable fire spell used by dwarven magi in their war against the trolls.

name: Destruction Sphere Spell
description: An immensely powerful spell created by the wizard lords of the underworld to harness dark energies.

name: Magic Nova Spell
description: An unimaginably destructive spell, devised by the great mountain thaumaturgists to battle against demonic giants.

name: Magic Nova Spell BulletNova
description: An unimaginably destructive spell, devised by the great mountain thaumaturgists to battle against demonic giants.

name: Magic Nova Spell DamageNova
description: An unimaginably destructive spell, devised by the great mountain thaumaturgists to battle against demonic giants.

name: Elemental Detonation Spell
description: A horrifically dangerous spell, formulated in the elemental planes during the great astral wars.

name: Burning Retribution Spell
description: A catastrophic spell of holy destruction, concocted in secrecy by the Liturgical Ones in their quest to learn a single letter of the divine language.

name: WizardST1
description: A cryptic scroll from the castle archives, unlike anything else in the forsaken collection. Only with supreme occult power may one harness the equalized power of the immortal elements, a technique long attributed to mere legend.

name: Cobra Serpentis Scroll
description: This ancient spell scroll, adorned with intricate hieroglyphs depicting the sinuous forms of cobras, invokes the power of the serpentine deities. Whispering secrets of venomous potency.

name: AoOSpell
description: All but Chancellor Dammah's own mages shun this blasphemous spell, channeling the dark energies of the earth to construct an explosive spike.

name: S15WizardST1
description: A surprisingly modern explosive for breaching boats below the waterline. Don't forget to run when you throw it to avoid the blast!

name: Esben's Vows
description: A hardy slab of ice wounded with crude markings on its surface. Passionate wedding vows are faintly readable.

name: Genesis Spell
description: Dammah's powers of summoning portals stem from this profane spell. Most may use it to call attacks from primitive dimensions of untapped energy, but Oryx's greatest thaumaturges can create stable gateways to the realm and beyond.

name: Genesis Spell Shiny
description: Dammah's powers of summoning portals stem from this profane spell. Most may use it to call attacks from primitive dimensions of untapped energy, but Oryx's greatest thaumaturges can create stable gateways to the realm and beyond.

name: Hydroflow Spell
description: An unorthodox scroll that calls forth a surge of extreme pressure water slicing clean through foes.

name: Jade Storm
description: A grand scroll capable of summoning sharpened emerald shards, slicing through even the most durable opponent.

name: Jade Storm Shiny
description: A grand scroll capable of summoning sharpened emerald shards, slicing through even the most durable opponent.

name: Legion Elite Spell
description: Unleashes powerful dark magic, overwhelming foes with ordered chaos.

name: Penetrating Blast Spell
description: This spell's destructive power is so notorious that casting it was banned for many generations.

name: Penetrating Blast Spell Shiny
description: This spell's destructive power is so notorious that casting it was banned for many generations.

name: Random Spell Extraction Device
description: This strange weapon sometimes affects the size of surrounding creatures.

name: pD Spell
description: Believed to have been lost in a bygone era, this spell was recovered from ruins infested by horrific creatures of unknown origin. The scroll is still steeped with parasitic organisms.

name: pD Spell Shiny
description: Believed to have been lost in a bygone era, this spell was recovered from ruins infested by horrific creatures of unknown origin. The scroll is still steeped with parasitic organisms.

name: Runes of Knowledge
