description: A stone slab adorned with enigmatic symbols, harkening to an era of ancient technology still shrouded in obscurity. These same inscrutable runes are found etched on surfaces within the Tundra, beckoning those who dare to decipher their secrets.

name: 2WizardST1
description: An enchanted parchment, written in the Slurpian dialect. Its magic commands the tides, allowing one to propel their own movement.

name: HWizardST1
description: The ghouls all came from their humble abodes to get a jolt from his electrodes.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Spelling Spell
description: An instructional spell used as an education tool for the training of young wizards. Before they run, they must learn to talk.

name: Sporous Spray Spell
description: An ancient druidic spell that invokes earth spirits into furnishing the soil with a noxious, deadly skullshroom colony.

name: Sporous Spray Spell Shiny
description: An ancient druidic spell that invokes earth spirits into furnishing the soil with a noxious, deadly skullshroom colony.

name: Tablet of the King's Avatar
description: Thought to have been lost to the ages, the wisdom imparted in this tablet will summon a power unrivaled by any modern spell.

name: Thousand Suns Spell
description: A spell that blasts enemies with the fiery force of a thousand suns.

name: 3WizardST1
description: The Pyrotechnicians are supposed to work on things like blasting caps and landmines, but often get distracted by the pretty colours of a violently detonating firework.

name: Vigil Spell
description: A seraphic wardspell that burns the unworthy with molten wax from the heavenly vigil.\n\nSprite Credits: Dappertron

name: Vitamine Buster
description: A bizzare spell fabricated by a powerful bunny magician, they don't only do trick shows inside those magic hats!

name: Vitamine Buster Shiny
description: A bizzare spell fabricated by a powerful bunny magician, they don't only do trick shows inside those magic hats!

name: Wandering Souls Spell
description: Shaping raw magic into spirit-like forms, phantasmal projectiles are launched, each one homing in on the target with the precision of a well trained archer.

name: Wandering Souls Spell Shiny
description: Shaping raw magic into spirit-like forms, phantasmal projectiles are launched, each one homing in on the target with the precision of a well trained archer.

name: X-Marks-the-Spot Spell
description: This ancient, cursed treasure map causes treasure to appear in front of the caster.  As the coins and jewels overlap in physical space this causes a massive explosion.

name: Remedy Tome
description: A hallowed tome of blessed healing rituals.

name: Spirit Salve Tome
description: An exalted holy tome, filled with prayers and blessed by angels.

name: Tome of Rejuvenation
description: A sacred tome, consecrated by the spirits of the upright and the supplications of the pure.

name: Tome of Renewing
description: An angelic tome, empowered by divine might and justified by the souls of the righteous.

name: Tome of Divine Favor
description: A sanctified tome, blessed by the heavens and purified by ancient rites, trembling with unseen divine power.

name: Tome of Holy Guidance
description: A tome of blessing, gifted by the gods for the benefit of all good mortals.

name: Tome of Hallowed Language
description: A tome beatified in starlight and written on paper from the ancient wisdom trees, cloaking the worthy in divine reverence.

name: 3PriestST1
description: A leech a day keeps the plague at bay.

name: PriestST1
description: Within, the priests of the past have catalogued the story and knowledge of Geb.

name: Botany Book
description: A precious tome filled with botanical research. It speaks of floral remedies used by alchemists long ago to cleanse all ailments.\n\nSprite Credits: Lily

name: 2PriestST1
description: Those who wish to be hallowed among Oryx's legion are required to drink the wretched concoction within this chalice, a mix between the Mad God's poorly kept wine and his own sentient bile.

name: Chaotic Scripture
description: The sacred writings of Leucoryx and his disciples, compiled as a tribute to Oryx to lend false credence to the teachings of his twisted followers.

name: Chaotic Scripture Shiny
description: The sacred writings of Leucoryx and his disciples, compiled as a tribute to Oryx to lend false credence to the teachings of his twisted followers.

name: Evolutionary Records
description: An ancient volume recording ancestral lineages dating as far back as the Primal Era. Infused with the essence of druidic magic, it grants the power to delve into nature's eternal transformation, morphing its caster into formidable creatures.

name: Hydroflow Tome
description: A holy tome whose scriptures call forth the soothing waves of the sea.

name: Legion Elite Tome
description: A corrupted tome pulsing with dark power, used by the Legion Elite to sustain their twisted forces and prolong their ruthless crusade.

name: Nativity Tome
description: A most holy manuscript taken from an ancient celestial library, brimming with golden light that wrests the innocent from the clutches of death.\n\nSprite Credits: Dappertron

name: Tome of Forbidden Knowledge
description: A tattered tome possessing the forbidden knowledge of pagan priests of old. It speaks of casting terrible curses upon opponents, but such impure power comes at a cost.

name: Tome of Forbidden Knowledge Shiny
description: A tattered tome possessing the forbidden knowledge of pagan priests of old. It speaks of casting terrible curses upon opponents, but such impure power comes at a cost.

name: HPriestST1
description: It takes zealotry bordering on madness to even dare utter the scathing words within this Tome. Its very contents blurred his vision and set his head to spinning. But he would dare.

name: Tome of Frigid Protection
description: A tome that allows the caster to encase themselves in extremely durable ice. However, despite being nearly impenetrable, it will melt after a while.\n\nSprite Credits: Poshun

name: Tome of Holy Furor
description: This tome was carried to battle by the members of a forgotten order.

name: Tome of Holy Protection
description: A tome dedicated to the works of a forgotten god. It is written in a strange script that glows with a pure white light.

name: Tome of Holy Protection Shiny
description: A tome dedicated to the works of a forgotten god. It is written in a strange script that glows with a pure white light.

name: Tome of Moral Support
description: The deepest wounds are not physical, but psychological. Only the wisest healers are savvy enough to apply the advanced treatment this tome enables, guaranteed to revitalize allies in their times of need.

name: pD Tome
description: An ancient tome covered with fleshy appendages. It contains the secrets to magic often considered blasphemous by priests, used to inflict horrible pain on others.

name: pD Tome Shiny
description: An ancient tome covered with fleshy appendages. It contains the secrets to magic often considered blasphemous by priests, used to inflict horrible pain on others.

name: Tome of Piracy
description: Pirates will not admit it, but they can't recall all the rules and regulations of piracy.  So they write them all down in books like these which become sacred relics of piracy.

name: Tome of Purification
description: An ancient tome cloaked in white leather, created to aid in the struggle against the ultimate evil.

name: Tome of Purification Shiny
description: An ancient tome cloaked in white leather, created to aid in the struggle against the ultimate evil.

name: Tome of the Dragon
description: This tome contains the original ancient dragon archives.

name: Tome of the Mushroom Tribes
description: A long-lost druid's tome that catalogs medicinal mushrooms. It also has many pocket spaces that contain spore samples, which can be made fully grown through incantations.

name: Tome of the Mushroom Tribes Shiny
description: A long-lost druid's tome that catalogs medicinal mushrooms. It also has many pocket spaces that contain spore samples, which can be made fully grown through incantations.

name: AoOTome
description: An accursed collection of religious texts detailing the Mad God's rise to power, granted to Oryx's high priests by Archbishop Leucoryx as a symbol of utmost trust.

name: VoidPriestST1
description: Its belly churns like a black hole, pulling in anything nearby with a hunger that defies all laws of nature.

name: Wilderlands Trap
description: A magical trap suited for hunting the strong beasts of the untamed country.

name: Deepforest Trap
description: An enchanted trap for hunting the fierce beasts of the dark forests.

name: Savage Trap
description: A mighty trap strong enough for the most vicious of magical beasts.

name: Demonhunter Trap
description: A potent trap powered by angelic spirits, used by demon hunters in the nether realms.

name: Dragonstalker Trap
description: A powerful magic trap charged with astral energies and used by the legendary dragon slayers of ancient times.

name: Giantcatcher Trap
description: A most effective magical trap used in the titan wars to hobble even the largest of enemy combatants.

name: Depthchaser Trap
description: An explosive ocean trap constructed to tear open the ironhide of the abyssal deepworm.

name: AoOTrap
description: An alluring entanglement forged with razor-like black iron. Oryx's most adept hunters use this device to severely wound their prey before executing them.

name: Cave Dweller Trap
description: A ceremonial trap used by the elite members of the Mushroom Tribes to ensnare those who trespass their sacred sanctum.

name: Cave Dweller Trap Shiny
description: A ceremonial trap used by the elite members of the Mushroom Tribes to ensnare those who trespass their sacred sanctum.

name: HHuntressST1
description: She had the Archexorcist himself bless this trap. She hoped it would be enough to help catch a miscreation of this size.

name: Coral Venom Trap
description: A trap imbued with deadly venom from the coral of the Ocean Trench.

name: Coral Venom Trap Shiny
description: A trap imbued with deadly venom from the coral of the Ocean Trench.

name: Deadly Keg
description: A barrel filled to the brim with the cheapest ale money can buy. The cask is highly pressurized and must be handled with care, should it be dropped it is likely to explode violently.

name: Deadly Keg Shiny
description: A barrel filled to the brim with the cheapest ale money can buy. The cask is highly pressurized and must be handled with care, should it be dropped it is likely to explode violently.

name: Greedsnatcher Trap
description: A seemingly harmless present that actually contains a magical hyperspace pocket stuffed to the brim with explosives and shrapnel.\n\nSprite Credits: Dappertron

name: Helium Trap
description: A devastating trap with some major hang time. It's full of hot air and not actually that useful, which is surely a metaphor for something.

name: HuntressST1
description: A strange trap that subdues would-be pilferers with a torrent of sticky honey.

name: Hydroflow Trap
description: This trap is nearly undetectable when deployed on the ocean's surface, releasing a powerful hydraulic blast when triggered.

name: Legion Elite Trap
description: Mechanized snares designed for strategic area denial and rapid ambush.

name: 2HuntressST1
description: Sprouted and plucked from an ancient, enchanted riverbank, this flower's spores weaken the roots of evil and strengthen righteous hearts.

name: 3HuntressST1
description: Slamming this charred iron rod into the ground will summon elemental energies to blast anyone who comes close.

name: Mimicry Trap
description: A crystal trap with a built-in luring mechanism. The perimeter of the trap reflects light toward the center to create an illusionary mimic.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Mouse Trap
description: A conventional tool used by rat hunters to snare rodents. Although simple, it proves to be timelessly effective.

name: Ocular Entrapment
description: A questionably sentient artifact smuggled from the Penitentiary's administration branch. Repeatedly irritating the summoned entity causes it to spew corrosive tears in a large area.

name: Ocular Entrapment Shiny
description: A questionably sentient artifact smuggled from the Penitentiary's administration branch. Repeatedly irritating the summoned entity causes it to spew corrosive tears in a large area.

name: Painbow
description: A trap of solid light, pummeling your foes more vividly than ever before!\n\nSprite Credits: Dappertron

name: Rain Maker
description: A sodden artifact held by Genji to stir nearby moisture into a torrent of localized rain. Only the Sage can extract its full potential, gracefully guiding the morning dew into a lasting downpour.

name: Sulfuric Stone
description: A peculiarly weathered rock with runes burned into it from generations of being submerged in the acidic bog. This makeshift snare is unmatched in power, but it activates on its own terms.

name: Sulfuric Stone Shiny
description: A peculiarly weathered rock with runes burned into it from generations of being submerged in the acidic bog. This makeshift snare is unmatched in power, but it activates on its own terms.

name: Trap of the Blood Spirit
description: This artifact is the result of a forbidden spell. It is made of crystalized blood.

name: Trap of the Vile Spirit
description: A long lost artifact recovered by Davy Jones, believed to have been cursed by the gods of the seven seas themselves.

name: Shiny Trap of the Vile Spirit
description: A long lost artifact recovered by Davy Jones, believed to have been cursed by the gods of the seven seas themselves.

name: Steel Wakizashi
description: A heavy wakizashi crafted by a fine metalworker.

name: Crimson Wakizashi
description: A deep red wakizashi made of bronze.

name: Enforced Wakizashi
description: A heavy wakizashi created and used by a secluded sect of powerful swordsmen.

name: Turquoise Wakizashi
description: A beautiful wakizashi, adorned with shining gemstones found within the extensive cavern, Okina Tomi.

name: Jade-Imbued Wakizashi
description: A wakizashi adorned with sea green stones, only given to the greatest swordsmen by the Grand Emperor himself.

name: Royal Wakizashi
description: A gorgeous wakizashi made of starmetal and gifted to an ancient king by the god Shinsetsuna for his devotion.

name: Virtuous Wakizashi
description: A pristine wakizashi exalted by the archangels themselves and awarded to combatants with the most pure hearts.

name: AoOWaki
description: A sacred blade forged by the ancient worshippers of the sun god. Though now corrupted under Oryx's rule, its unique craftsmanship still showcases its ability to focus a strike upon a single point.

name: Esben's Shattered Heart
description: The frostbitten winds whisper her name, and the blades sing of her sorrow.

name: Esben's Shattered Heart Shiny
description: The frostbitten winds whisper her name, and the blades sing of her sorrow.

name: Fractured Gemstone Wakizashi
description: Carved from the unblemished minerals deep beneath the realm, this unconventional wakizashi fractures itself when swung to release a strange supernatural energy.

name: Fractured Gemstone Wakizashi Shiny
description: Carved from the unblemished minerals deep beneath the realm, this unconventional wakizashi fractures itself when swung to release a strange supernatural energy.

name: Hydroflow Wakizashi
description: A mastercrafted bluesteel blade, weightless and sharp, cutting through air like surging water.

name: Kogbold Multitool
description: The KI132 Bladed Multitool finds its way into the hands of many Kogbold Engineers sent out on expeditions. It is equipped with blades for any situation, as well as a handy pair of pliers.

name: Kogbold Multitool Shiny
description: The KI132 Bladed Multitool finds its way into the hands of many Kogbold Engineers sent out on expeditions. It is equipped with blades for any situation, as well as a handy pair of pliers.

name: Legion Elite Wakizashi
description: A wicked wakizashi forged from shadowsteel, granted to Shadow Legion warlords as a reward for their ruthless conquest.

name: NSFWakizashi
description: A double-edged wakizashi that exposes in more ways than one.

name: Peppermint Wakizashi
description: A wakizashi fashioned from perennial ice. Its innocent, festive appearance belies its lethal edge.\n\nSprite Credits: Dappertron

name: Ronin's Wakizashi
description: An artifact once wielded by a wandering samurai with no master to serve. It was preserved in the Cursed Library for historical purposes, but it remains just as deadly despite its age.

name: Ronin's Wakizashi Shiny
description: An artifact once wielded by a wandering samurai with no master to serve. It was preserved in the Cursed Library for historical purposes, but it remains just as deadly despite its age.

name: SamuraiST1
description: Calls upon old energy to unleash a swarm of dragon like energy spirits.

name: Sakura Wakizashi
description: A whimsical wakizashi of Eastern origin; it has a pleasant aroma of cherry blossoms.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Sentinel's Sidearm
description: Use of magical weapons is typically reserved for the king's mage units. For a swordsman to receive such a fine piece of craft was considered a great honor, and perhaps still is.

name: Sentinel's Sidearm Shiny
description: Use of magical weapons is typically reserved for the king's mage units. For a swordsman to receive such a fine piece of craft was considered a great honor, and perhaps still is.

name: Sentinel's Sidearm (Rehearsal)

description: The first and last teardrop of the ominous fiery demon.

description: A keepsake held closely by Thessal, clinging to the unlikely chance of her king's continued wellbeing. Any sailor knows this slim hope is all that contains the true beast of the seas.

name: Antinomy Artifact
description: True power is only available to those that have accepted all of its manifestations. To wield force that could affect the cosmic balance, one needs to forge their own equilibrium, tempered in the flames of strife.

name: 2ArcherST3
description: Though his magic was strong, my resolve was stronger. The spirit dissipated and all that remained was the treasure within.

name: 2BardST3
description: A breathtaking amulet believed to portend the will of the storm. The large stone within faintly swirls, as though an entire cyclone were somehow petrified by force of the earth.

name: Autarch Amulet
description: Oryx ordered the careful construction of this charm in hopes of mimicking the unique life-altering powers of a legendary amulet lost to the ages.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Battalion Banner
description: The battle standard of Beisa's forces, a sign of triumph for Oryx and calamity for those he faces.

name: Battalion Banner Shiny
description: The battle standard of Beisa's forces, a sign of triumph for Oryx and calamity for those he faces.

name: Bloodshed Ring
description: A seemingly shattered ring that keeps itself together with an unknown magnetic force. It only stays together on the finger of a true killer.

name: KnightST3
description: It is believed that Oryx siphons a drop of blood from each hero he slays for use in this intimidating crimson ring.

name: 3SorcererST3
description: This enchanted pendant heightens your elemental abilities and agility, enabling quick placement of Storm Totems and devastating attacks.

name: Bracer of the Guardian
description: A colossal gauntlet of masterful composition. Its sheer size is disproportionate for most warriors, only able to be worn on one's forearm as a bracer. A once glossy exterior faded from battle long ago, yet the sturdiness of its make is as resolute as it ever was.

name: Bracer of the Guardian Shiny
description: A colossal gauntlet of masterful composition. Its sheer size is disproportionate for most warriors, only able to be worn on one's forearm as a bracer. A once glossy exterior faded from battle long ago, yet the sturdiness of its make is as resolute as it ever was.

name: Bracer of the Guardian (Rehearsal)
description: A colossal gauntlet of masterful composition. Its sheer size is disproportionate for most warriors, only able to be worn on one's forearm as a bracer. A once glossy exterior faded from battle long ago, yet the sturdiness of its make is as resolute as it ever was.

name: 3KnightST3
description: Slip on these savage Knuckles and unleash a whirlwind of swings, each powered by an uncanny dexterity that leaves foes questioning what hit them.

name: Brewer's Bangle
description: A small golden band meant to be worn on one’s ear. This mundane looking accessory appears to give the wearer an increased tolerance to intoxicants.

name: Brewer's Bangle Shiny
description: A small golden band meant to be worn on one’s ear. This mundane looking accessory appears to give the wearer an increased tolerance to intoxicants.

name: 3SummonerST3
description: Within this unknown bud lies a hum of Natures energy, if well cared for it may one day bloom into something never before seen.

name: HTricksterST3
description: A humble hat with some dirt and straw stuck between the cloth. Being a scarecrow ain't much, but it's honest work.\n\nSprite Credits: Bonk, Aurum

name: SummonerST3
description: This feat of technology enables approved users to control all primary functions of the lab facility and access otherwise encrypted data.

name: Candy Ring
description: A high-fructose ring that will give you pep, but hurt your concentration.

name: Candy Ring Shiny
description: A high-fructose ring that will give you pep, but hurt your concentration.

name: Captain's Ring
description: Captain Davy Jones' ring.

name: Captain's Ring Shiny
description: Captain Davy Jones' ring.

name: Chancellor's Cranium
description: The warped mind of Oryx's appointed chancellor. This cursed object thrives in the presence of demented energies.

name: Chancellor's Cranium Shiny
description: The warped mind of Oryx's appointed chancellor. This cursed object thrives in the presence of demented energies.

name: Chef's Hat
description: The Appetizers prized toque which shows his expertise in a variety of different cooking techniques.

name: E2SummonerST3
description: Ears of chocolate, ears of charm, ears that make every hop a little sweeter.

name: Shatters A20
description: As the nameless monarch sat malcontent upon the throne, his ambitions and impiety became one, and with this came enlightenment. A legacy reduced to less than legend, utterly erased from the nescient minds of the land, with its only epitaph being the sorry remnant of his majesty's dearest. After all, what good are kings in a realm of gods?

name: 2HuntressST3
description: Expertly carved from ancient trees and fitted together with their sap, this ring's flowers have absorbed magical energy over many years, storing it within its fruit.

name: HArcherST3
description: There's a certain irony to this macabre amulet. It's not very comfortable to wear and will seldom let you snooze.\n\nSprite Credits: Tero, Aurum

name: Collector's Monocle
description: Treasurer Gemsbok had this monocle custom made to enhance his perception in stealth strikes.

name: Collector's Monocle Shiny
description: Treasurer Gemsbok had this monocle custom made to enhance his perception in stealth strikes.

name: Colossus Ring Melee
description: A sheet of pure marble was dedicated to the crafting of this ring, bestowed upon the finest warriors who rose past insurmountable challenges.

name: Shatters A2000
description: The symbol that claims absolute subservience from its beholder.

name: Coral Ring
description: A ring crafted from the dangerous Fire Coral.

name: Coral Ring Shiny
description: A ring crafted from the dangerous Fire Coral.

name: The Void Ring Tank
description: The corrupting presence of the ring is held back only by the finest protectors who rose past insurmountable challenges.

name: Corsair Ring
description: A lavish golden ring adorned with a prized ruby from Dreadstump's spoils.

name: Corsair Ring Shiny
description: A lavish golden ring adorned with a prized ruby from Dreadstump's spoils.

name: Crystal Bone Ring
description: A ring made from a splinter of crystallized sacrificial bone.

name: Crystal Bone Ring Shiny
description: A ring made from a splinter of crystallized sacrificial bone.

name: Crystal Key
description: A mysterious key bestowed upon the Keyper by the Crystal Entity, imbued with an aura of forbidden magic. It fits no locks, yet it can open anything.\n\nSprite Credits: Trensient

name: Crystallised Mist
description: This strange trinket creates a cloud of crystaline particles rendering anyone inside invisible.

name: 2NecroST3
description: Fitted with a cube shaped crystal, this band is capable of mitigating harm to the wearer.

name: WizardST3
description: An unsettling glow looms beneath the partitioned gem's surface, ever-changing yet always in immaculate balance. Soon enough its power may be unleashed again.

name: HSorcererST3
description: The Incubus has real horns, but wearing these as well somehow makes him even more irresistible.

name: Divine Coronation
description: A majestic crown of the venerated, bestowed upon Archbishop Leucoryx to solidify his position in Oryx's legion.

name: Divine Coronation Shiny
description: A majestic crown of the venerated, bestowed upon Archbishop Leucoryx to solidify his position in Oryx's legion.

name: S15WizardST3
description: Thick, lead ingots used to keep a diver's feet on the floor. They are definitely not gold bars being smuggled out of a secret mine.

name: E.Y.E.
description: The gouged eye of the ferocious F.E.R.A.L. It is no longer potent enough to generate energy beams, but the beast's psychic vision still instinctively lashes back at aggressors.

name: E.Y.E. S.H.I.N.Y
description: The gouged eye of the ferocious F.E.R.A.L. It is no longer potent enough to generate energy beams, but the beast's psychic vision still instinctively lashes back at aggressors.

name: Eden's Embrace
description: The empyreans thought otherwise, but I would not remain sealed. For my embrace reaches the whole Realm, and my will is eternity.

name: Frosted Great Ring
description: This ring is not crafted, but a fossilized piece of the great frost mountains the Jotunn call home.

name: Elemental Equilibrium
description: Within this relic all elements swirl in perfect equilibrium. What would otherwise unleash cataclysmic disaster holds together in immaculate arcane homeostasis. We would surpass it.

name: MotMG Light Ring
description: A small yet potent flame brought down from the heavens. It burns bright with the power of life.

name: MotMG Dark Ring
description: A burning shard hailing from the Void itself; the concentrated torment of lost souls.

name: Emblem of the Empire
description: Handed down through generations of Pharaohs, it holds power over more than just the wills of Nefret's subjects.

name: Enchanted Ice Shard
description: The ice this item is made of doesn't seem to melt.

name: Entropy Reactor
description: A device used by alien researchers to stabilize power cores as a means of safely extracting their power.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Esben's Wedding Ring
description: A memento of a life long gone. You can still feel the warmth from years past through the frigid ice that has taken over.

name: 3VNecroST4
description: Wielded by those who’s hearts faced difficulties yet continued on, representing both the good and bad and continued strength love can bring.

name: 3VNecroST3
description: Cultivated from the slain friends and foes lies the very essence of love both the good and bad, any hero who dares to wield such a thing will drive its user mad.

name: Exalted God's Horn
description: A horn claimed from Oryx's iconic helmet. To hold this in one's hand is a monumental insult to the Mad God's ego.

name: Exalted God's Horn Shiny
description: A horn claimed from Oryx's iconic helmet. To hold this in one's hand is a monumental insult to the Mad God's ego.

name: Experimental Ring
description: An early prototype ring.

name: Experimental Ring Shiny
description: An early prototype ring.

name: 3MysticST3
description: A crystalline formation in the shape of an eye remains the sole artifact of the journey’s true purpose- a secret beyond the stars waiting to be discovered. Beyond the dark horizons of the cosmic plane, what else has Cronus left behind for the explorers of the present to discover?

name: 2PaladinST3
description: Though lacking physical form, this trinket grants a sense of sight that allows beings from the realm of shadow to peer into the worlds bathed in light.

name: Interregnum Ring 2
description: A once prized piece of Nefret's collection. Though its beauty has long since faded, it has retained its power.

name: Fairy Ring
description: The magical drop of resin fixed atop this ring is a precious keepsake of the Fey. Those who possess it are protected by an old pact formed by the keepers of the forest.

name: Fairy Ring Shiny
description: The magical drop of resin fixed atop this ring is a precious keepsake of the Fey. Those who possess it are protected by an old pact formed by the keepers of the forest.

name: 3NecroST3
description: A necklace of fangs stolen from vicious swamp creatures. The predatory strength of the beasts empowers the wearer.

name: 2KenseiST3
description: A beautiful accessory which burns constantly to guide you through battle.

name: 2WarriorST3
description: Less prominent pirates use personal hooks to signify their rank. Though it is almost entirely symbolic on its own, no true pirate is complete without one.

name: 2TricksterST3
description: A mere flame from the legendary forgefire used by Daeva master crafters, this trinket grants awe-inspiring powers to those deemed worthy.

name: Foreman's Hard Hat
description: A stout hard hat worn by the most devoted leaders of the realm's ambitious reconstruction projects. The height of Personal Protective Equipment!\n\nSprite Credits: Trensient

name: Interregnum Ring 3
description: An ancient relic of the Oni Clan, bursting with an energy like none other.

name: Frimarra
description: It's said that this necklace was created to protect the mortal lover of an old God.

name: 3PaladinST3
description: In the white wastes, Squall answers no prayers, spares no lives, and grants no solace.

name: Geb's Lost Hedjet
description: Crafted from glistening ivory and adorned with shimmering gold, but seems carry an ancient protection spell coming from the Underworld.

name: PriestST3
description: It is said that the ring attunes its wearer to the earth and its life force.

name: Gem of Adoration
description: Dedicated to the one who will see beauty within.\n\nSprite Credits: Trensient

name: Gem of Adoration Shiny
description: Dedicated to the one who will see beauty within.\n\nSprite Credits: Trensient

name: Gem of Tenderness
description: Only until you find true love, will you know what sweet tenderness feels like.\n\nSprite Credits: Trensient

name: Gem of Tenderness Shiny
description: Only until you find true love, will you know what sweet tenderness feels like.\n\nSprite Credits: Trensient

name: 2KnightST3
description: A ceremonial horn gifted to the Vikings from their ancient gods. Blowing it is said to temporarily bestow to the owner the power of Odin, known by some northern clans as Zimmer.

name: 3HuntressST3
description: This gigantic wig contains a lot of electrical energy due to being 90% wire wool.

name: HNecroST3
description: Drinking the blood within is said to separate one's soul from their flesh, becoming an eternal disciple of the afterlife.\n\nSprite Credits: TLMaelstrom

name: 3WarriorST3
description: The teddy's head is down the well with the others.

name: Heart of the Eternal Pyre
description: A pulsating ruby encased in a band of white gold that grows warm when danger nears. It grants the wearer the resilience of the phoenix, allowing their spirit to flicker but never truly go out as long as the sun continues to rise.

name: BardST3
description: A ring of light bestowed upon the virtuous as a divine symbol of their consecration.

name: NinjaST3
description: Spiraling treasure\nPrayer beads for the downpour\nCoiled in grateful hands.

name: His Majesty's Eminence
description: The pride of the shattered kingdom, restored to a point where it can truly be called such. Even beholding its former glory cannot cover the ominous reality behind it.

name: AssassinST3
description: The parasites are not individual beings; they share a single consciousness.

name: HuntressST3
description: The solid honey on this ring renews its wearer with incredible energy.

name: HPaladinST3
description: The severed head of an imp grew horns posthumously, an eerie piece of natural decor.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: SorcererST3
description: Fetid claws imbued with dangerous chemicals, pulled from the Horrific Creation.

name: Ice Crown
description: An ancient artifact, once worn by a corrupt king of the frost realms.\n\nSprite Credits: Poshun

name: 2WizardST3
description: As a memento of their kingdom, royal slurps are given one of these sacred pearls when adventuring out into the world.

name: NecroST3
description: Our fight was glorious, but in the end, I fell in battle and joined him in undeath.

name: Jade Beetle
description: A glorious block of solid jade, sculpted to resemble a sacred scarab beetle from the time of the ancients. This extraordinarily rare relic was granted to mortal athletes by Bes, Nut, and Geb themselves in recognition of great swiftness.

name: 3TricksterST3
description: Concentrated within this gemstone are souls of vengeance, burning to serve one final role to smite the oppressors of the living.

name: Kagenohikari
description: An ethereal lantern charged with the hundreds of hopes and memories of bygone souls. Its light seeks to guide and protect those still dwelling within the mortal plane.

name: Laborer's Hard Hat
description: A rugged hard hat worn by stalwart workers in the name of reconstruction.\n\nSprite Credits: Trensient

name: 3SamuraiST3
description: Perhaps at some point, a man wore this pendant in search of something that humans could possibly offer. As the pendant lost meaning, it became a reminder that what he sought was not of mortal nature.

name: Loaded Core
description: An odd device with four power cores slotted inside. It loudly buzzes with energy, eager to direct its strength somewhere.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Locked Reactor
description: Though sealed tight, a quiet hum can be heard coming from the energy within.

name: 3WizardST3
description: This grenade was launched from a firework and failed to explode. It will release deadly sparks when shaken violently enough, but until then it serves as a potent good-luck charm.

name: Magical Lodestone
description: The source of power for the Marble Colossus found within his core. It is intended to give life to golems, but it can provide benefits to the living as well.

name: 3OArcherST3
description: Knitted with love and care, it's magical properties are able to keep its user warm and protect their heart from turning cold.

name: HNinjaST3
description: A string of prayer beads made from a combination of wood, seeds and gemstones. This ancient relic emboldens the wearer during meditation and spiritual practices.

name: Mask of Anubis
description: A relic of the Tomb of the Ancients, once used by holy worshipers in ceremonies.\n\nSprite Credits: Beige

name: Mask of Cnidaria
description: An uncomfortably squishy piece of headgear that the Royal Cnidarian probably wants back.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Mask of Lightning
description: A gilded artifact discovered in the temple of El Dorado, presumably belonging to none other than Xolotl himself.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Mask of Mucus
description: An ordinary mask covered in copious amounts of sludge from the Toxic Sewers.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Mayhem Medallion
description: The Mad God's likeness has been finely forged into this prestigious medal for acclaimed minions.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: HWarriorST3
description: And shun the frumious Man-Wolf-Beast!

name: Nightmatter Circlet
description: An immaculate Nightmatter Core set in a housing that acts as a conduit granting power to its wearer, the power grows even stronger in the presence of additional nightmatter.

name: 3NinjaST3
description: A paper amulet dedicated to the deities. It is said to bring luck and protection to its holder.

name: Omni-Impotence Ring
description: An unfathomable lack of strength is found in this ring. Only the most unreasonable mortals would ever consider voluntarily handicapping themselves so aggressively.

name: Omnipotence Ring
description: An unfathomable amount of strength pulses through this ring. Only the most righteous mortals can touch this ring and live.

name: Omnipotence Ring Shiny
description: An unfathomable amount of strength pulses through this ring. Only the most righteous mortals can touch this ring and live.

name: Operator's Hard Hat
description: A sturdy hard hat worn by steadfast pioneers to bring the realm's territories up to code. Wear it with pride!\n\nSprite Credits: Trensient

name: Ornaments of Unity
description: A majestic chain of ornaments, each holding astounding powers. If paired with enough essence of Oryxmas, it will gift the most righteous of hearts the absolute power of the winter.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Oryx Dominus Crest
description: A dazzling trophy commemorating the winners of Sebchoof's 2026 RotMG Olympics Event.

name: Oryxmas Ornament: Energized
description: A blue ornament taken from Oryx's magical Oryxmas Tree. Inside, it contains the secrets to the past, which can be unleashed to gift its holder with the power of infinite possibilities.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Oryxmas Ornament: Exposed
description: A red ornament taken from Oryx's magical Oryxmas Tree. It radiates with pure winter energy that highlights the weak spots of even the bulkiest of foes.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Oryxmas Ornament: Weak
description: A yellow ornament taken from Oryx's magical Oryxmas Tree. The aura it emits fills even the bitterest of hearts with pure joy, causing their blows to land with less force than before.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Overclocking Amulet
description: Placing this trinket into an appropriate slot found on Steamworks machines activates their overclock drastically increasing output. The increased speed causes a greater amount of wear on the parts of the machine, usage of this item is only authorized to higher ranking Kogbolds.

name: Overclocking Amulet Shiny
description: Placing this trinket into an appropriate slot found on Steamworks machines activates their overclock drastically increasing output. The increased speed causes a greater amount of wear on the parts of the machine, usage of this item is only authorized to higher ranking Kogbolds.

name: E2ArcherST3
description: Like a fragile egg waiting to hatch, it holds immense potential within its delicate shell.

name: 2SorcererST3
description: A classy top hat known to have all manner of surprises in store, including rabbits, of course.

name: 2AssassinST3
description: A cursed gemstone imbued with numerous plagues. While unfavorable to one's stamina, it proves itself useful with the associated resistances.

name: HWizardST3
description: Everything was cool, Ruthven's a part of the band. And his monster mash was the hit of the land.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: 3PriestST3
description: It smells of lavender and roses, but it looks like death.

name: HBardST3
description: The longer you wear it, the more you feel in tune with the darker forces of the realms, rumored to cause red skin.

name: HPriestST3
description: The origin of the stone in this ring, and its connection to the staff that bore the Banshee's curse: a secret he would carry to his grave.

name: DruidST3
description: Sturdy brass gauge ring that allows for monitoring its users status while boosting power and protection.

name: 3AssassinST3
description: Thick leather gloves allowing the user to handle the most toxic of materials, but harsh words still hurt the same.

name: 2NinjaST3
description: What serves as the life support for all of the artificial creatures constructed by the Crystal Entity is also capable of bestowing strength and energy to organic life.

name: Regal Ring
description: A legendary citrine ring said to grant unfathomable amounts of dexterity to those who possess it.

name: ArcherST3
description: An otherworldly gemstone is set in this oddly tight ring. It does not seem designed for human fingers.

name: Ring of Cubed Wisdom
description: A cubic sapphire embedded in a circular gold ring.

name: Ring of Cubed Wisdom Shiny
description: A cubic sapphire embedded in a circular gold ring.

name: Ring of Decades
description: Cut from a fallen star, a deep purple emanating an unearthly glow, hinting at the power fused within.

name: Ring of Decades Shiny
description: Cut from a fallen star, a deep purple emanating an unearthly glow, hinting at the power fused within.

name: Ring of Divine Faith
description: A ring that symbolizes divine might.

name: Ring of Divine Faith Shiny
description: A ring that symbolizes divine might.

name: 2PriestST3
description: When the arduous path to anointment is complete, the priest is decorated with this symbolic ring of servitude, modeled after Oryx's famed warriors.

name: PaladinST3
description: Many do not realize how powerful a kind wish is.

name: Blooming Ring
description: This blooming flower ring will bring a touch of grace and charm on your adventures while also keeping you alive and healthy.

name: Ring of Skeletal Specters
description: A ghastly ring that calls upon the eager hands of an impossible undead creature.

name: Ring of Skeletal Specters Shiny
description: A ghastly ring that calls upon the eager hands of an impossible undead creature.

name: Ring of the Burning Sun
description: A ring forged by the mad god in the flames of the suns surface. Its magic protects its owner from some harm. Original Design by DieGo.

name: MysticST3
description: As I lifted the stone from its resting place it became readily apparent there was more to it than met the eye...

name: 2MysticST3
description: With the enchantress reduced to ash, the stone burst, scattering the relics of the mystic into the realm's lava fissures. They have since awaited a daring hero to recover the pieces from the clutches of demons.

name: Ring of the Magus
description: A sigil ring with a carved gemstone signifying the wearer's dedication to the Path of the Magus. An aspiring hero who wears this ring will shape magic to their will and unleash an arcane torrent upon any that oppose them.

name: Ring of the Nile
description: The azure stone makes you feel ready for any situation.

name: Ring of the Nile Shiny
description: The azure stone makes you feel ready for any situation.

name: Ring of the Northern Light
description: A mysterious light emanates from the stone.

name: Ring of the Pyramid
description: The dolomite stone makes you feel able to stand against anything.

name: Ring of the Pyramid Shiny
description: The dolomite stone makes you feel able to stand against anything.

name: Ring of the Sniper
description: A sigil ring with a carved gemstone signifying the wearer's dedication to the Path of the Sniper. An aspiring hero who wears this ring will strike true and with a force great enough to topple even the greatest of adversaries.

name: Ring of the Sphinx
description: The malachite stone makes you feel at peace with the land.

name: Ring of the Sphinx Shiny
description: The malachite stone makes you feel at peace with the land.

name: Ring of the Stalwart
description: A sigil ring with a carved gemstone signifying the wearer's dedication to the Path of the Stalwart. An aspiring hero who wears this ring will become an insurmountable warrior capable of taking the force of any foe.

name: Ring of the Swiftblade
description: A sigil ring with a carved gemstone signifying the wearer's dedication to the Path of the Swiftblade. An aspiring hero who wears this ring will move faster than their enemies can perceive and strike before they even have a chance to react.

name: Ring of Unbound Love
description: My heart couldn't be anymore full!\n\nSprite Credits: WunderWafe

name: Ring of Wrath
description: The massive ruby set in this weighty ring is believed to control and harness the wearer's rage.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Control Core Ring Archer
description: The targeting core continues to adjust and perfect the skills of the finest marksmen who rose past insurmountable challenges.

name: Rose Brooch
description: Beautiful yet dangerous, only those who value the lives of flowers can carry such a rose. This rose retaliates back with sharp thorns to anyone that seeks to harm this rose or its user.

name: Rusted Mechanism
description: A rusted piece of Kogbold machinery recovered from the depths of the ocean. The only question is, how did it get on a thousand-year-old shipwreck?

name: TricksterST3
description: Used to bind aggressive golems. Considering they are no longer attached, they do not appear to have been very effective.

name: 2RogueST3
description: A ruby-beaded necklace, carried by the cadaverous followers of Lord Ruthven.

name: The Forgotten Ring Magic
description: The shattered trinket is held together by the force of determination from the finest mages who rose past insurmountable challenges.

name: Snake Eye Ring
description: A ring made from the eye of the Snake Queen.

name: Snake Eye Ring Shiny
description: A ring made from the eye of the Snake Queen.

name: 3NecroST4
description: An amulet housing a powerful soul. It calls out and draws wandering spirits towards the wearer.

name: 3RogueST3
description: The Soul Necklace radiates a faint inner glow as it binds to the wearer’s spirit, heightening their intuition and granting whispers of guidance from lingering echoes of the past. When its power stirs, it steadies the heart and sharpens the senses as if unseen guardians watch from just beyond the veil.

name: Soulful Affection
description: To my better half!\n\nSprite Credits: Trensient

name: Soulful Affection Shiny
description: To my better half!\n\nSprite Credits: Trensient

name: Sourcestone
description: Unknown.

name: RogueST3
description: The charm embedded into this ring grants the power to absorb and redirect souls for placement in the afterlife.

name: Spider's Eye Ring
description: A ring crafted from the faceted eye of an enormous spider.

name: Spider's Eye Ring Shiny
description: A ring crafted from the faceted eye of an enormous spider.

name: 2HNecroST3
description: Worn as a means of punishment for prisoners.

name: 2SummonerST3
description: When etched into stone, this mark greatly amplifies one's resilience, as though it echoes the earth's power. Hollow relics like these are an oddity, as earth shamans regarded the designed permission of flowing air as a sign of severe fault.

name: E2PaladinST3
description: Bask in the glow of the sun while staying safe from the shadows.

name: Sun Hat
description: A hat that shields you from the blazing sun and heat, perfect for staying cool in the Realm.

name: Interregnum Ring 1
description: Lost in a battle over the open seas, this magnificent fire opal studded ring that buzzes with an unyielding power.

name: Sunken Ring
description: Coral from the depths of the ocean which has formed into a natural ring. Painful to put on and take off, but very rare and therefore desirable.

name: Superior Mask of Anubis
description: An even more ancient relic of the Tomb of the Ancients, once used by holy worshippers in ceremonies. It turns your character into the Pharaoh Necromancer upon equip!

name: Superior Mask of Cnidaria
description: A not so uncomfortably squishy piece of headgear that the Royal Cnidarian probably wants back. It turns your character into the Dark Knight Trickster upon equip!

name: Superior Mask of Lightning
description: A very gilded artifact discovered in the temple of El Dorado, presumably belonging to none other than Xolotl himself. It turns your character into the Dark Master Wizard upon equip!

name: Superior Mask of Mucus
description: A not so ordinary mask covered in copious amounts of sludge from the Toxic Sewers. It turns your character into the Slurp King Knight upon equip!

name: Sweetener Ring
description: A beautifully crafted ring shaped like a heart, symbolizing the sweetness of love.

name: 3ArcherST3
description: Wearing this brass monocle allows a Turretsmith to see down their turret's sights, granting them greater accuracy at the expense of personal style.

name: The Forgotten Crown
description: An eerie reminder of what lies in the depths of the Shatters.

name: The Forgotten Crown Shiny
description: An eerie reminder of what lies in the depths of the Shatters.

name: The Forgotten Crown (Rehearsal)
description: An eerie reminder of what lies in the depths of the Shatters.

name: The Forgotten Ring
description: Part of a sacramental rite, the memory of which has faded with those who observed its divine grace.

name: The Golden Forgotten Crown
description: A radiant artifact, bestowed upon those who have proven themselves. It symbolizes not only mastery, but also the unwavering determination of champions in their pursuit of glory.

name: The Hemomancer's Ring
description: The ultimate prize of a master blood mage, this ring's crimson stone glows faintly with restless energy. It rewrites the rules of the flesh it touches.

name: The Twilight Gemstone
description: A peculiar stone, tremendously heavy for its size and seemingly not of this world. Its very presence in the realm raises a great deal more questions than answers, yet the uncanny energy it emanates provides only one haunting clue.

name: The Twilight Gemstone Shiny
description: A peculiar stone, tremendously heavy for its size and seemingly not of this world. Its very presence in the realm raises a great deal more questions than answers, yet the uncanny energy it emanates provides only one haunting clue.

name: The Twilight Gemstone (Rehearsal)
description: A peculiar stone, tremendously heavy for its size and seemingly not of this world. Its very presence in the realm raises a great deal more questions than answers, yet the uncanny energy it emanates provides only one haunting clue.

name: Thistleleaf Necklace
description: This necklace once signified the everlasting bond between two people. As if alive, this necklace carries with it an aura of spite and anguish.

name: Thistleleaf Necklace Shiny
description: This necklace once signified the everlasting bond between two people. As if alive, this necklace carries with it an aura of spite and anguish.

name: Tiara of Eggscellent Sturdiness
description: This tiara grants really good defense.\n\nSprite Credits: Piggby

name: 3BardST3
description: A traditional small totem carved from strong and indigenous wood, worn close to the heart. It hums with ancestral chants, protecting the wearer and amplifying the call of the spirits.

name: Token of Happiness
description: An aged coin of unfamiliar design, gently glowing with the spirits of happiness. This seemingly modest keepsake invigorates your body, readying you for the next move.

name: Token of Warmth
description: An aged coin of unfamiliar design, gently glowing with the spirits of warmth. This seemingly modest keepsake puts your mind at ease, mending your wounds.

name: 2SamuraiST3
description: A handy compass that reminds travelers of the homes they will someday return to.

name: HSummonerST3
description: She would always carry an overpowering desire of revenge upon those that set her on this cursed path. She would pursue them for eternity.

name: HHuntressST3
description: And still, she would not let the Vampire's curse she carried define her. Just as she would go on to rid others of their own curses. With violence, if needed.

name: VoidPriestST3
description: It smells of nothing, but it looks like death.

name: 2HKnightST3
description: Made for traversing through the cold realms, they provide great comfort while allowing the hero to not lose their footing no matter the terrain.

name: HMysticST3
description: The true source of Totalia's powers. This ornament contains a small amount of liquid freely moving inside. It's cold-hot-fresh!\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Yokai Amulet
description: Forged in silvered fire and etched with sacred sigils, this ring hums with the presence of a vigilant spirit. When called upon, the guardian Komainu emerges to shield its bearer, tempering harm and sharpening strength with the ferocity of a divine protector.

name: Reinforced Bow
description: An iron-reinforced bow.

name: Hardwood Bow
description: A bow made from sturdy hardwood.

name: Greywood Bow
description: A bow made from the rare greywood tree.

name: Ironwood Bow
description: A high-quality bow made of magical ironwood.

name: Fire Bow
description: A bow that shoots arrows that burn with an unholy fire.

name: Sharpshooter Bow
description: A well-crafted bow carried by master marksmen.

name: Hunter's Longbow
description: A longbow used by Orcish hunters.

name: Redwood Bow
description: An elven enchanted bow that originates from the elusive redwood forests.

name: Gilded Longbow
description: A gilded longbow more suitable for decoration than battle.

name: Golden Bow
description: A gilded bow gifted to mortals from the gods themselves.

name: Emerald Longbow
description: A longbow empowered by magical emerald energy.

name: Verdant Bow
description: A highly effective bow fashioned of still-living magical springwood.

name: Bow of Fey Magic
description: A powerful bow crafted by dryads and blessed by the spirits of the woodlands.

name: Mystic Longbow
description: A longbow carefully crafted by pure magic.

name: Bow of Innocent Blood
description: A runed bow steeped in the dark power of ancient injustice.

name: Crimson Longbow
description: A deadly longbow once used by a tribal warlord.

name: Bow of Covert Havens
description: A diamondwire bow used by guardians of the unseen ethereal shrines.

name: Longbow of the Endless Sky
description: A powerful longbow said to be a gift from the Daeva.

name: Bow of Mystical Energy
description: A superlative bow of sunsteel and diamondwire, created by a secretive race of star-dwelling entities.

name: Longbow of the Morning Spirit
description: An unrivaled longbow that empowers the user with renewed hope.

name: Bow of Deep Enchantment
description: A peerless triple bow crafted of nightmatter and diamondwire by the exalted bowyers of the primeval overgods.

name: Longbow of the Midnight Diamond
description: An ancient longbow forged with an unmatched forgotten technique.

name: Makakoyumi 2
description: Once fired in dissent against the heavens, now an icon of divine judgement. It bears the scar of wrathful light, a permanent reminder of having forever changed the course of the world.

name: Anteros Longbow
description: Wielding this bow leads the user to become a defender of love. Helping people that are without love and smiting anyone that seeks to harm where love shines.

name: B.O.W.
description: The arrows of this grotesque bow are laced with an inverted energy, causing shots to lose velocity and create brief barriers.

name: B.O.W. S.H.I.N.Y.
description: The arrows of this grotesque bow are laced with an inverted energy, causing shots to lose velocity and create brief barriers.

name: Baked Bow
description: After years of tinkering with the algorithms, Null created a deadlier replica of the Butter Bow to create the Baked Bow. This bow showcases the power of butter, enjoy these tasty baked treats.

name: 2HuntressST0
description: Decorated with the finest flora of the realm's toughest forests, this bow uses the sharp cymes of plant life as arrows against would-be vandalizers.

name: Blazon Bow
description: A stunning bow forged in the heat of a massive star many lightyears beyond the realm.

name: Blazon Bow Shiny
description: A stunning bow forged in the heat of a massive star many lightyears beyond the realm.

name: 3HuntressST0
description: This experimental device harnesses the power of lightning, allowing you to science your enemies senseless with raw energy.

name: Bow of the Morning Star
description: A bow of light forged by the angels for use in their eternal struggle against darkness and evil.

name: Bow of the Void
description: Every shot that hits a target frees the soul of a forgotten hero. Every shot that misses is trapped for eternity.

name: Bow of the Void Shiny
description: Every shot that hits a target frees the soul of a forgotten hero. Every shot that misses is trapped for eternity.

name: Bramble Bow
description: A prickly bow with unshaven thorns jutting out from the grip, making it unwieldy to fire.

name: Bramble Bow Shiny
description: A prickly bow with unshaven thorns jutting out from the grip, making it unwieldy to fire.

name: Brilliance Bow
description: A revered bow hidden away for many years by those wise enough to recognize the danger of its devastating might. Its strength is unmatched throughout the universe.

name: Butter Bow
description: Crispy, buttered, wheat or rye. In toast it lives, in toast it dies.

name: Celestial Recurve
description: A wondrous bow of heavenly origin, harnessing Daevic magic to bend and concentrate light into tangible projectiles. At the point where these beams intersect, a dazzling burst of celestial brilliance radiates.

name: Clockwork Repeater
description: A bow of unbelievable weight. It requires multiple Kogbold Workers to fire a single arrow.

name: Clockwork Repeater Shiny
description: A bow of unbelievable weight. It requires multiple Kogbold Workers to fire a single arrow.

name: Coral Bow
description: A bow fashioned from living coral found in only the deepest ocean trenches.  It is the favored weapon of those that inhabit the realms beneath the waves.

name: Coral Bow Shiny
description: A bow fashioned from living coral found in only the deepest ocean trenches.  It is the favored weapon of those that inhabit the realms beneath the waves.

name: Cupid's Bow
description: This probably doesn't have a chance of making monsters fall in love with you. I mean, I don't think so.

name: ArcherST0
description: Distinguished archers are permitted to take their prized bow with them to the afterlife. It conjures ethereal arrows when drawn, penetrating the very souls of living beings.

name: Doom Bow
description: No mortal can fire this dreaded bow without resting in between shots. It requires tremendous skill to wield.

name: Doom Bow Shiny
description: No mortal can fire this dreaded bow without resting in between shots. It requires tremendous skill to wield.

name: 3ArcherST0
description: This firearm was created as an experiment by welding two double-barrelled cannons together. One of the barrels fell off when it was first fired, but the other three work fine.

name: 3BardST0
description: Forged in the heart of an eternal blaze, this sacred weapon funnels the fury of ancestral spirits. Each arrow sears both flesh and soul.

name: 2BardST0
description: Tugging the bowstring fiber disrupts a delicate balance between the limbs of this bow, rapidly crystallizing the surrounding frost into a serrated bolt of hail.

name: Longbow of the Guardian
description: This longbow has protected the mountain shrines for centuries in the hands of countless legendary archers. The hail of arrows it fires is said to purify wretched spirits of corruption.

name: BardST0
description: A delightful instrument played among the serene choirs of saintly singers in the hallowed realms above.

name: Laser Rifle
description: One of the many feats of alien technology in Calbrik's arsenal. It comes equipped with an automatic missile launcher.

name: Leaf Bow
description: Fashioned from the finest logs found within the Woodland Labyrinths, this bow uses sharp leaves instead of conventional arrows. Such lightweight ammunition allows for quick movement.

name: Leaf Bow Shiny
description: Fashioned from the finest logs found within the Woodland Labyrinths, this bow uses sharp leaves instead of conventional arrows. Such lightweight ammunition allows for quick movement.

name: Makakoyumi
description: A bow believed to have only been fired in dissent against the heavens. In retribution, the empyrean rulers have cursed this device to tether its wielders in shackles of divine light.

name: Shiny Makakoyumi
description: A bow believed to have only been fired in dissent against the heavens. In retribution, the empyrean rulers have cursed this device to tether its wielders in shackles of divine light.

name: HuntressST0
description: A flexible ironwax bow created by the Felwasp Guards to defend their larvae from assailants.

name: Predator Bow
description: Not one for long distance combat himself, Oryx leaves archery training in the hands of former realm heroes who defected to his side.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: 2ArcherST0
description: I courageously descended into the ruins, only to be bombarded with cactus spines as sharp as arrows.

name: Spider Silk Bow
description: A well-crafted bow made from the hardened spider exoskeletons and their powerful silk.

name: Spider Silk Bow Shiny
description: A well-crafted bow made from the hardened spider exoskeletons and their powerful silk.

name: Sun's Judgement
description: The abnormal alignment of Malogia's moons block direct light from its sun during most of its revolution. The brief periods of visibility are ferociously hot.\n\nSprite Credits: Artauris

name: Sun's Judgement Shiny
description: The abnormal alignment of Malogia's moons block direct light from its sun during most of its revolution. The brief periods of visibility are ferociously hot.\n\nSprite Credits: Artauris

name: Thousand Shot
description: A deadly repeater crossbow and a marvel of craftsmanship. This mechanical weapon is efficient, but carries additional weight.

name: Thousand Shot Shiny
description: A deadly repeater crossbow and a marvel of craftsmanship. This mechanical weapon is efficient, but carries additional weight.

name: Warmonger
description: Rarely brandished and in pristine condition, the old monarchy deemed this exquisite recurve too dignified for all but royalty to handle. Though it remains unproven in practical combat, this bow's raw potential is unmatched, waiting to be drawn out through pure focus.

name: Warmonger Shiny
description: Rarely brandished and in pristine condition, the old monarchy deemed this exquisite recurve too dignified for all but royalty to handle. Though it remains unproven in practical combat, this bow's raw potential is unmatched, waiting to be drawn out through pure focus.

name: Dirk
description: A short sword blade mounted on a dagger hilt.

name: Blue Steel Dagger
description: A dagger made of blued steel.

name: Dusky Rose Dagger
description: A dagger made of rose-tinted steel.

name: Silver Dagger
description: A silver-plated steel dagger.

name: Golden Dagger
description: A well-made dagger plated with gold and inscribed with evil runes.

name: Obsidian Dagger
description: A dagger with a blade made of volcanic glass.

name: Mithril Dagger
description: An extremely sharp dagger made from the strongest and most desirable of all metals.

name: Royal Blades
description: These intricately crafted blades were originally intended more for ornamental purposes rather than function, but still remain potent for any form of combat.

name: Blazing Blades
description: A set of knives wrapped in an ever burning flame.

name: Fire Dagger
description: A dagger with a blade that burns with an unholy magic.

name: Garnet Blades
description: Razor sharp gemstone blades that emit a faint, magic hum.

name: Ragetalon Dagger
description: A sharp druidic dagger vibrating with primal energies.

name: Emeraldshard Dagger
description: A deadly dagger of glittering magical emerald.

name: Verdant Blades
description: Blades wielded only by those among the strongest of mortals, their green edges gleam in sunlight.

name: Agateclaw Dagger
description: A dagger of rare purple agate, infused with powerful dark magics.

name: Occult Blades
description: Used primarily in ritual worship, repeated exposure to dark magic has imbued this pair of daggers with sinister powers.

name: Bloodshed Blades
description: Entire wars have been waged over the bloodstone of which a pair of these blades has been crafted from. A single pair carries the cost of thousands of deaths.

name: Dagger of Foul Malevolence
description: A crimson felsteel dagger saturated with evil magic and primordial hatreds.

name: Dagger of Sinister Deeds
description: A moonsteel dagger of the underworld, corrupted by loathsome enchantments and profane spells.

name: Moonstone Blades
description: These blades are made from a material beyond the reaches of the realm, their origin shrouded in mystery, but their edge undoubtedly sharp.

name: Dagger of Dire Hatred
description: A jagged, wickedly barbed blade of evil, charged with the unreasoning rage of ancestral vendettas.

name: Soulforged Blades
description: The weight of a single swing carries the vigor of a hundred past heroes, their souls bound together in the shape of blades so they may once again slay evil.

name: 2TricksterST0
description: The eldest of Daeva warriors crafted this sacred weapon to smite all that dare oppose the forces of the light.

name: Avarice
description: The pride of Treasurer Gemsbok, this gilded knife has backstabbed countless traders in shady dealings.

name: Avarice Shiny
description: The pride of Treasurer Gemsbok, this gilded knife has backstabbed countless traders in shady dealings.

name: 3TricksterST0
description: Her blade of choice was cursed to be unfit to harm the likes of gods. Through accursed soul binding, she found a means to adapt this curse into a terrifying weapon.

name: Bone Dagger
description: A dagger made of razor-sharp bone.

name: Bone Dagger Shiny
description: A dagger made of razor-sharp bone.

name: Bounty Hunter's Dagger
description: The Mad God knows the value of cloak and dagger operations, despite his personal inclination toward more overt tactics. Oryx's minions consider it a great honor to be gifted this dagger.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: TricksterST0
description: A makeshift dagger hastily crafted from the debris of a fallen golem. It may be blunt, but it is also very lightweight.

name: Chain Dagger
description: Of all the tools found on Kogbold excavation bots, none is more versatile than the KI225 Chain Cutter. Useful for cutting through unwanted obstructions ranging anything from stone to flesh.

name: Chain Dagger Shiny
description: Of all the tools found on Kogbold excavation bots, none is more versatile than the KI225 Chain Cutter. Useful for cutting through unwanted obstructions ranging anything from stone to flesh.

name: Corrosion Cutter
description: Interestingly, freezing the acid of Forax into a solid material retains its burning properties. Crafty alien mercenaries have used this to create brutal assassination weapons such as this.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Corrosion Cutter Shiny
description: Interestingly, freezing the acid of Forax into a solid material retains its burning properties. Crafty alien mercenaries have used this to create brutal assassination weapons such as this.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Corruption Cutter
description: A fragment of Lord Ruthven's curse manifest itself into this pulsating dagger. Its formless state allows it to cut in ways no other weapon could.

name: Corruption Cutter Shiny
description: A fragment of Lord Ruthven's curse manifest itself into this pulsating dagger. Its formless state allows it to cut in ways no other weapon could.

name: Dirk of Cronus
description: This legendary dagger was commissioned by a band of mad rogues to prove the worth of the Dirk.

name: Dirk of Cronus Shiny
description: This legendary dagger was commissioned by a band of mad rogues to prove the worth of the Dirk.

name: Dueling Daggers
description: A set of daggers given partial sentience by alien technology. They fiercely compete to claim more kills than the other.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Dueling Daggers Shiny
description: A set of daggers given partial sentience by alien technology. They fiercely compete to claim more kills than the other.

name: RogueST0
description: Made of a strange metal not known to the living. Its connection to the spirit plane causes a high pitched shriek as it slashes.

name: Fractal Blades
description: An impossibly intricate pattern belies these blades, carved from a self-perfecting crystalline deity.

name: Fractal Blades Shiny
description: An impossibly intricate pattern belies these blades, carved from a self-perfecting crystalline deity.

name: Groovy Mango
description: After years of tinkering with the algorithms, Null created a deadlier replica of Mister Mango to create the Groovy Mango. This jamming mango was given the time to sweeten and ripen into a groovy party rocking entity.

name: Hatchling Blades
description: The gooey chocolate pellets attract the Hatchling, which fetches them back to the wielder along with bites taken out of whatever they are attached to.

name: Heart Jewel Blades
description: Jewel Encrusted blades, these weapons hold a special power to those that fight for love.

name: Heartfind Dagger
description: This dagger is said to point in the direction of the one you love. Or intend to stab.

name: Marionette Ravager
description: The perfect tool for dismembering theatre equipment.

name: Marionette Ravager Shiny
description: The perfect tool for dismembering theatre equipment.

name: Mischief
description: A whimsical dagger surrounded by a maelstrom of spiritual energy. Its desirability lies in its uniquely chaotic nature.

name: Mister Mango
description: Displaying this malformed mango in public is said to awaken the rage of a long-dormant entity from beyond.

name: Needlessly Large Spoon
description: Only a spoonful.

name: 3RogueST0
description: A crescent of weightless shadow that glimmers like frost on midnight air, the Phantom Sickle cuts through illusions and unravels the echoes clinging to wandering spirits. Its spectral edge parts unseen veils with each sweep, revealing hidden truths that linger just beyond mortal sight.

name: Poison Fang Dagger
description: A dagger fashioned from the fang of an enormous spider.

name: Poison Fang Dagger Shiny
description: A dagger fashioned from the fang of an enormous spider.

name: EH Queen's Stinger Dagger
description: The blade of this dagger was once the enormous Killer Bee Queen's stinger. It remains exceptionally sharp, and could easily cut through even the heaviest of armor in a single strike.

name: Shiny EH Queen's Stinger Dagger
description: The blade of this dagger was once the enormous Killer Bee Queen's stinger. It remains exceptionally sharp, and could easily cut through even the heaviest of armor in a single strike.

name: 2RogueST0
description: A two-faced blade enchanted with the wicked power of immortal beings.

name: Spirit Dagger
description: A dagger that was condemned to Davy Jones' Locker.

name: Spirit Dagger Shiny
description: A dagger that was condemned to Davy Jones' Locker.

name: AssassinST0
description: The melding of these creatures and their host is one of pain and suffering.

name: The Right Hook
description: A famous boxer once said the secret to their victory was having a great right hook, this dagger’s craftsman took that literally.

name: The Right Hook Shiny
description: A famous boxer once said the secret to their victory was having a great right hook, this dagger’s craftsman took that literally.

name: 3AssassinST0
description: It croaks, you croak.

name: 2AssassinST0
description: An appalling dagger with a blade forged of a highly resilient metal, one of the very few materials that can withstand the corrosive properties surrounding it.

name: Sigil of the Bunny
description: A pendant with a carved turquoise stone resembling the form of a bunny.

name: Sigil of the Skunk
description: A bronze pendant symbolising the skunk whose form is deceptively powerful to a druid’s foes.

name: Sigil of the Fox
description: A pendant bearing the form of a fox which is reserved only for more advanced druids. The speed and cunning provided by the transformation is a powerful tool for druids.

name: Sigil of the Wolf
description: A silver pendant representing the wolf, this form is similar to the fox but provides additional strength for combat druids to leverage over their enemies.

name: Sigil of the Boar
description: A boar shaped pendant, its form radiates strength and tenacity. Druids capable of sustaining this form are among the strongest the druidic orders have to offer.

name: Sigil of the Horse
description: A golden sigil set with sapphire gemstones, druids call upon the form of the horse for its high strength and unparalleled stamina.

name: Sigil of the Rhino
description: A gilded sigil with ruby gemstones, delicately shaped into the form of the Rhino. This form represents the pinnacle of normal druids, only surpassed by druids choosing to specialize in more mythical creatures.

name: Crystalline Sigil
description: An incredibly complex and durable crystalline structure appears on this pendant where a druid might expect the representation of an animal. Familiarising oneself with its forms is incredibly difficult but druids who succeed find themselves to be unbreakable walls against all forms of threat.

name: Draconic Insignia
description: This relic was once used by a secluded cult of dragon worshippers. A druid may tap into its arcane power to embrace the form of a dragon.

name: AoO Sigil
description: Similar to the falconers in the ranks of Chief Beisa, the agents of oryx employed hawks to do their bidding. Their speed and hunting acumen allow them to be incredible inspiration for druids among the agent’s ranks.

name: Hydroflow Sigil
description: This sacred druid sigil allows the user to take on the form of a great serpent from the darkest depths of the ocean.

name: Legion Elite Sigil
description: A pair of horns adorning a nightmatter-weave band. Allows one to mimic the full combat abilities of chief beisa

name: DruidST1
description: This device was forged by an engineer attempting to artificially recreate the ways of the druid. Using it allows for not only summoning robotic raptor companions, but to form a suit of armor that might be piloted to lead them.

name: Sharktooth Sigil
description: This necklace is adorned with the tooth of a great white shark. Druids who familiarize themselves with this item may take on its form becoming the apex of the seas.

name: Sharktooth Sigil Shiny
description: This necklace is adorned with the tooth of a great white shark. Druids who familiarize themselves with this item may take on its form becoming the apex of the seas.

name: Sigil of the Reindeer
description: This pendant radiates warmth that staves off the winter cold, it is adorned with a symbol of a reindeer. Some druids believe the form is capable of flight.

name: Sigil of the Rubber Duck
description: A powerful sigil displaying the form of the most menacing creature of the realm. Acts as a flotation device in a pinch.

name: Silken Sigil
description: A live spiderling with a string formed of its own silk, a druid may befriend it to gain increased familiarity with the form of a spider, a traditionally hard form to undertake.

name: Swarmlord's Sigil
description: Fashioned by the Beekeeper, this pendant allows the wearer to command the forces of the nest directing swarms of bees to attack the wearer's enemies.

name: Swarmlord's Sigil Shiny
description: Fashioned by the Beekeeper, this pendant allows the wearer to command the forces of the nest directing swarms of bees to attack the wearer's enemies.

name: Kendo Stick
description: Suitable for practice.

name: Plain Katana
description: A basic katana.

name: Thunder Katana
description: A striking fine-edged weapon.

name: Line Kutter Katana
description: A katana capable of cutting a razor-thin line.

name: Night Edge
description: An ancient katana with a blade of jet black steel.

name: Sky Edge
description: A beautiful katana, forged and cooled by the mists atop a great mountain.

name: Buster Katana
description: A mighty weapon wielded by a hero from long ago.

name: Cloudstrike Tachi
description: A pair of weighty swords that carry with it thunderous strikes from its namesake.

name: Demon Edge
description: A cruel blade forged in hell flame and blood.

name: Devilbane Tachi
description: Blades made from the bones of infernal beings, used to fell the same creatures it was forged from.

name: Darksteel Tachi
description: Tempered blades crafted from enchanted Darksteel and set with a gleaming ruby.

name: Jewel Eye Katana
description: A mighty katana with a crystal eye embedded in the hilt.

name: Dragonbone Tachi
description: This dense set of blades has been crafted with the bones of beasts only spoken of through legend.

name: Ichimonji
description: One of the legendary great blades of the master Ichimonji.

name: Accursed Tachi
description: A pair of blades of unknown origin, within their edges a dark power can be felt, threatening to corrupt the user should they not be sated in battle.

name: Muramasa
description: An evil blade that hungers for blood.

name: Masamune
description: A magnificent legendary blade which only cuts those who deserve death.

name: Skyslash Tachi
description: Keen blades that never grow dull, their slashes threaten to split the very sky itself.

name: Sadamune
description: A formidable blade that was meticulously crafted over the course of several centuries by the most renowned masters in history.

name: Sunset Tachi
description: Weapons of striking beauty, their colors displaying all the shades of twilight, each slash like a brushstroke, painting its own landscape.

name: Godslayer Tachi
description: The culmination of countless generations of swordsmiths, each perfecting their craft and improving these blades gradually. The pinnacle of weapons created by mortals for use in slaying the immortal.

name: Kusanagi
description: An awe-inspiring sword gifted to only the most worthy mortals from the highest heavens, channeling gales of wind in the hands of the blameless.

name: Blade of Ages
description: A katana once belonging to a royal sorcerer known for great ambition, but slow delivery. His treasured blade was prophesied to produce something wonderful... eventually.

name: Blade of Blooming
description: After years of tinkering with the algorithms, Null created a deadlier replica of the Blade of Ages to create the Blade of Blooming. Nature would slowly takeover this blade blooming with beautiful roses.

name: Blade of the Assailant
description: Though Oryx is only known to deploy his assassin units in times of personal need, the deliberately cruel craftsmanship of their katanas is no less remarkable.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Bloodbath Blade
description: A malevolent katana infested with parasitic organisms. The ravenous symbiotes instills in its user a thirst for blood, which grows as it drinks from the life force of its wielder and their foes alike.

name: Brambletooth Tachi
