description: A heavily serrated blade set studded with thorns from the many ravenous plants of the Sulfurous Wetlands. The accursed magic used to mutate the native flora has been likewise imbued to these blades, enabling for a unique yet precise slashing technique.

name: Brambletooth Tachi Shiny
description: A heavily serrated blade set studded with thorns from the many ravenous plants of the Sulfurous Wetlands. The accursed magic used to mutate the native flora has been likewise imbued to these blades, enabling for a unique yet precise slashing technique.

name: Burial Blades
description: Jagged obsidian and smooth malachite blades inscribed with runes and teeming with energy. The runes read as a eulogy for those lost while trying to seal a great evil.

name: Burial Blades Shiny
description: Jagged obsidian and smooth malachite blades inscribed with runes and teeming with energy. The runes read as a eulogy for those lost while trying to seal a great evil.

name: Celestial Blade
description: An ancient weapon imbued with the power of the cosmos.

name: Celestial Blade Shiny
description: An ancient weapon imbued with the power of the cosmos.

name: Diamond Bladed Katana
description: Diamonds are a girl's best friend, they also happen to make for great blades... so shiny!

name: Doku No Ken
description: Stuck in the maw of the Son of Arachna, this katana is coated in the creature's poisonous venom. In the hands of the right person, this is a truly deadly weapon.

name: Doku No Ken Shiny
description: Stuck in the maw of the Son of Arachna, this katana is coated in the creature's poisonous venom. In the hands of the right person, this is a truly deadly weapon.

name: Enforcer
description: Chief Beisa designed and forged this sawtoothed blade himself to be granted admission as a gladiator. Its shattering strikes are amplified by his own slashing techniques.

name: Enforcer Shiny
description: Chief Beisa designed and forged this sawtoothed blade himself to be granted admission as a gladiator. Its shattering strikes are amplified by his own slashing techniques.

name: 2KenseiST0
description: A light powerful blade, capable of burning even the toughest opponents.

name: Fire Blade
description: Though rather unremarkable as far as alien weapons go, Malogian clans swear by this weapon as a good luck charm. Some things never change.

name: Fire Blade Shiny
description: Though rather unremarkable as far as alien weapons go, Malogian clans swear by this weapon as a good luck charm. Some things never change.

name: 3SamuraiST0
description: The Advisor would come to know that power is given to the opportune, and those who would adapt and utilize the Frost would be capable of becoming its master.

name: Jewel Eye Katana Shiny
description: A mighty katana with a crystal eye embedded in the hilt.

name: SamuraiST0
description: A Katana made to harness the energy of the Wind.

name: Kendo Stick Shiny
description: Suitable for practice.

name: 2SamuraiST0
description: A heavy iron blade set in a handle crafted from tough wood from the eastern tundras. Each slash carries immense amounts of force.

name: Kyuuketsuki Hitogoroshi
description: Ruthven hid this blade in the hope none would be able to find it, for it could destroy him and his spawn in a single slash.

name: Kyuuketsuki Hitogoroshi Shiny
description: Ruthven hid this blade in the hope none would be able to find it, for it could destroy him and his spawn in a single slash.

name: Moonbeam Blade
description: The frigid landscape of Untaris is chilled by the moonlight reflected from a planet of astral frost.\n\nSprite Credits: Trensient

name: Moonbeam Blade Shiny
description: The frigid landscape of Untaris is chilled by the moonlight reflected from a planet of astral frost.\n\nSprite Credits: Trensient

name: 2NinjaST0
description: Though its composition is merely a sharp crystal embedded in a rock, this naturally formed blade glistens with light, carving a path for its wielder to use.

name: Ray Katana
description: A great katana charged with the power of the sun itself.

name: Ray Katana Shiny
description: A great katana charged with the power of the sun itself.

name: NinjaST0
description: First summer storm cloud\nInflicting a thousand cuts\nBrilliance, then ash.

name: KenseiST0
description: In the right hands, this fluid blade lashes out with stinging water whips. Such adept control over the wild waters is thought to be a sign of great achievement for any swordsman.

name: 3NinjaST0
description: A short copper cane adorned with interlocking rings. The jangling of the rings can be heard whenever the Onmyoji approaches.

name: Socket Blade
description: A rather unusual ratcheting blade used by the Kogbolds to tighten the bolts on the Kogbold Steamwalker.

name: Socket Blade Shiny
description: A rather unusual ratcheting blade used by the Kogbolds to tighten the bolts on the Kogbold Steamwalker.

name: Sweetheart Taichi
description: Formerly wielded by lovers, their battle would end defending their home in the far lands of the realms. Both lovers are gone, but their blades remain and will never part.

name: Tools of the Tarnished
description: Two of Groundskeeper Gretch's most coveted tools, tainted by a powerful curse that draws out the life essence of its user to maintain their finesse.

name: Tools of the Tarnished Shiny
description: Two of Groundskeeper Gretch's most coveted tools, tainted by a powerful curse that draws out the life essence of its user to maintain their finesse.

name: Valor
description: Exceedingly large and challenging to handle, this titanic blade embodies the stoic might of its true owner.

name: Valor Shiny
description: Exceedingly large and challenging to handle, this titanic blade embodies the stoic might of its true owner.

name: Void Blade
description: An astronomically heavy katana. It is forged from dark matter.

name: Void Blade Shiny
description: An astronomically heavy katana. It is forged from dark matter.

name: Firebrand Staff
description: A staff imbued with potent magical fire.

name: Comet Staff
description: A staff charged with the icy powers of the heavens.

name: Serpentine Staff
description: A staff powered by the magic of Stheno's minions.

name: Meteor Staff
description: A staff that harnesses the energy of shooting stars.

name: Slayer Staff
description: A powerful staff crafted by demons for waging war on mortals.

name: Avenger Staff
description: A slender felwood staff pulsing with auras of vengeance and justice.

name: Spellblade of Decimation
description: A powerful spellblade known to wipe out entire armies.

name: Staff of Destruction
description: An ancient knurlwood staff crackling with power and exuding thin gray vapors.

name: Spellblade of Nightmares
description: A strange spellblade said to cause the user to lose their minds.

name: Staff of Horror
description: A mysterious runewood staff decorated with horrific figures.

name: Spellblade of Arcane Magic
description: A glistening spellblade empowered by light.

name: Staff of Necrotic Arcana
description: A golden staff imbued with the powers of death magic.

name: Spellblade of Corrupt Premonitions
description: A spellblade once used by mages of a fallen kingdom.

name: Staff of Diabolic Secrets
description: An imposing golden staff of tremendous otherworldly power.

name: Spellblade of Starry Insight
description: A magnificent spellblade used by those who worship the stars.

name: Staff of Astral Knowledge
description: A splendid golden staff of astonishing power, bathed in light and brimming with magical energy.

name: Spellblade of the Sun
description: A golden spellblade made by harnessing a fraction of the sun's power.

name: Staff of the Cosmic Whole
description: A golden staff of transcendent understanding, made from crystals present at the formation of the universe.

name: Spellblade of the Heavens Light
description: A masterfully crafted spellblade used by the guardians of Elysium.

name: Staff of the Vital Unity
description: A golden staff of elysian consciousness, shining with the base power of empyrean truths.

name: Spellblade of the Everlasting Death
description: A spellblade forged through the suffering of souls that have lost their way.

name: Staff of the Fundamental Core
description: An otherworldly staff of omnipresent elation, embodied of cardinal essence and the power of deathless peace.

name: Bogwood Crook
description: This ornate herding staff composed of an old willow branch has been warped beyond mortal comprehension due to prolonged influence of the twisted beings of the Sulfurous Wetlands.

name: Bogwood Crook Shiny
description: This ornate herding staff composed of an old willow branch has been warped beyond mortal comprehension due to prolonged influence of the twisted beings of the Sulfurous Wetlands.

name: Comet of Calamity
description: An irregular fragment of a fiery comet that once passed over Malogia. Intergalactic legends know it as the herald of the great alien lord Nizos.\n\nSprite Credits: Trensient

name: Comet of Calamity Shiny
description: An irregular fragment of a fiery comet that once passed over Malogia. Intergalactic legends know it as the herald of the great alien lord Nizos.\n\nSprite Credits: Trensient

name: WizardST0
description: This transmogrified crook bolsters the ability to peer into pocket dimensions and cling to the essence within. Such a characteristic arguably makes the staff itself sentient, a harrowing trait for the tool which gave the Shattered Kingdom its name.

name: Crystallized Worm Spellblade
description: The worms of the Crystal Caverns are capable of surviving indefinitely so long as their heads remain intact. The affixation of this particular worm's head onto a quarterstaff prevents it from regenerating the rest of its body and causes it to angrily lash out, biting anything brought near it.

name: NecroST0
description: My staff led me to a strange arena, which seemed to have a dark aura about it.

name: Elder Staff
description: Carved from the heartwood of an ancient tree and imbued with the whispering spirits of the forest, this staff channels centuries of wisdom.

name: Foramite Staff
description: A rod composed of solid foramite, the only known material in the galaxy capable of withstanding the corrosive effects of Foraxian acid.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Foramite Staff Shiny
description: A rod composed of solid foramite, the only known material in the galaxy capable of withstanding the corrosive effects of Foraxian acid.

name: Jailer's Scythe
description: A weapon used by Skuld's soul collectors to absorb and send souls to their final destinations.

name: Jailer's Scythe Shiny
description: A weapon used by Skuld's soul collectors to absorb and send souls to their final destinations.

name: K.I.D.D. Force
description: A highly unstable staff engineered to expel forceful bolts of an energy component known as K.I.D.D. (Knee-deep In Dungeon Design). It's not great now, but allegedly the second version will be better.

name: K.I.D.D. Force 2.0
description: After years of tinkering with the algorithms, Null created a deadlier replica of the K.I.D.D. Force to create the K.I.D.D. Force 2.0. Upgraded with even less shades, this staff has really come around.

name: Love Heart Spellblade
description: Bestowed to trusted allies of the Love Hearts Guild, this spellblade conquers evil heart-breakers with the power of positive emotions.

name: Mechanical Kogbold Limb
description: An unknown Kogbold appendage, seemingly more machine than flesh.

name: Mechanical Kogbold Limb Shiny
description: An unknown Kogbold appendage, seemingly more machine than flesh.

name: 3MysticST0
description: A pristine cloud of nebular stardust gently rests atop a focusing rod in a tranquil stasis, until it is catalyzed into a microscopic genesis of stellar proportions. It is a reminder of the thin divide between uncreation and creation, a transcendental dance of the cosmos.

name: Oppressor's Staff
description: Initially built solely for Oryx's reckless use, the construction of this staff proved potent enough to mass produce for Oryx's champions.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: 3WizardST0
description: Kogbold rockets are highly explosive.  The inaccurate nature of the weapon is made up for by the sheer volume of shots they can launch at once.

name: S.T.A.F.F.
description: Dr. Terrible modeled this staff in the likeness of his creation as an experimental attachment to the M.E.R.V. design. To prevent overheating, the unstable energy discharges require a moment to cool.

name: S.T.A.F.F. S.H.I.N.Y.
description: Dr. Terrible modeled this staff in the likeness of his creation as an experimental attachment to the M.E.R.V. design. To prevent overheating, the unstable energy discharges require a moment to cool.

name: 3NecroST0
description: A staff of grisly, warped wood cradling a luminous green gemstone. It is said to be powered by souls trapped within the gem.

name: Spirit Staff
description: The souls of legendary heroes live on in this vibrant elderwood staff. It represents the ancient druidic pact to protect the domains of Fey across the Realm.

name: Spirit Staff Shiny
description: The souls of legendary heroes live on in this vibrant elderwood staff. It represents the ancient druidic pact to protect the domains of Fey across the Realm.

name: 2NecroST0
description: A radiant staff with a square-shaped conduit at its edge. Only the most prestigious of cuboid monarchs are allowed to wield such a weapon.

name: Staff of Adoration
description: The unusual shots that this staff fires have been known to bind the hearts of your foes for all eternity, or at least until death do you part.

name: 2MysticST0
description: In the primal era of the realm, the volcanic mountains were overrun with rampant lava spirits, spiteful creatures who sought to burn all they could touch.

name: Staff of Esben
description: Perhaps all that remains of Esben, whoever he was.\n\nSprite Credits: Pfiffel

name: Staff of Extreme Prejudice
description: Once the most powerful staff in existence; a crack in its frame has rendered it incapable of focusing fire. It remains uniquely deadly.

name: Staff of Extreme Prejudice Shiny
description: Once the most powerful staff in existence; a crack in its frame has rendered it incapable of focusing fire. It remains uniquely deadly.

name: Staff of MotMG
description: A staff that can only be wielded by those embodying both justice and power.

name: Staff of the Crystal Serpent
description: An ancient staff used both for sacrifice and communion with the gods.

name: Staff of the Crystal Serpent Shiny
description: An ancient staff used both for sacrifice and communion with the gods.

name: Staff of Unholy Sacrifice
description: A commanding staff used by vile cult leaders. Its power manifested through countless sacrifices to the demon Molek.

name: Staff of Unholy Sacrifice Shiny
description: A commanding staff used by vile cult leaders. Its power manifested through countless sacrifices to the demon Molek.

name: Steam Pipe
description: Efforts by lower workers of the kogbolds to arm themselves against invaders has resulted in various interesting crudely made armaments. Fashioned from the boiler of a steam generator, this staff projects its scalding vapors towards a target, cooking them alive.

name: Steam Pipe Shiny
description: Efforts by lower workers of the kogbolds to arm themselves against invaders has resulted in various interesting crudely made armaments. Fashioned from the boiler of a steam generator, this staff projects its scalding vapors towards a target, cooking them alive.

name: Superior
description: This aptly named staff is the manifestation of Chancellor Dammah's assertions of grandeur. Although he seldom uses it for actual combat purposes, it is no less potent as a legitimate weapon.

name: Superior Shiny
description: This aptly named staff is the manifestation of Chancellor Dammah's assertions of grandeur. Although he seldom uses it for actual combat purposes, it is no less potent as a legitimate weapon.

name: Tezcacoatl's Tail
description: Adult male basilisks are apex predators, and at full maturity their tails gain the unique ability to release piercing acid from the tip.

name: Tezcacoatl's Tail Shiny
description: Adult male basilisks are apex predators, and at full maturity their tails gain the unique ability to release piercing acid from the tip.

name: MysticST0
description: I was a fool before, but now everything is so clear. The phylactery speaks to me, knows me, protects me.

name: 2WizardST0
description: A decorated forked weapon which can influence and control water, sending torrential downpours of calamity at aggressors.

name: Torrential Staff
description: A majestic trident adorned with enchanted coral formations that enables command of the tides. Once wielded by King Alexander in his conquest of the oceans, its power has since faded with each passing moon from natural weathering.

name: Vigor
description: The energy that emanates from this staff attracts spirits of all sorts to join in on festivities. A simple wave orchestrates their movement.

name: Broad Sword
description: A broad-bladed steel sword.

name: Saber
description: A single-edged light sword.

name: Long Sword
description: A well-made sword with a double edged blade.

name: Falchion
description: A single-edged broad-bladed sword.

name: Fire Sword
description: A fiery blade capable of burning flesh and bone.

name: Glass Sword
description: A sword formed from a single shard of unbreakable glass.

name: Gilded Flail
description: Commissioned by a particularly gaudy lord for his armies, this flail gleams as brightly as the armor he was once known to wear.

name: Golden Sword
description: A sharp sword plated with gold, clearly intended for the use of a great lord.

name: Champion's Flail
description: Often seen used in arenas across the lands, flails like these offer a perfect balance of weight and power.

name: Ravenheart Sword
description: A powerful sword infused with the spirit of dark rituals.

name: Dragonsoul Sword
description: A sword forged in a great volcano and consecrated with dragon magic.

name: Drakerider's Flail
description: Once wielded by a band of knights from atop their lightning drake companions, a thunderous roar can be heard with each swing.

name: Archon Sword
description: A sword pulsing with the powerful magic of ancient beings.

name: Infernal Flail
description: Forged in the fires of the underworld, the mace atop this flail emits a heat reminiscent of its origins.

name: Mithril Flail
description: A masterpiece of craftsmanship with the strongest and most desirable of all metals, as deadly as it is egregiously expensive.

name: Skysplitter Sword
description: An unfathomably powerful sword wielded by titanic air elementals in their great war of revolution.

name: Celebrant Flail
description: Granted only to heroes who have returned from missions of world saving renown. Those who receive it are cemented in legend.

name: Sword of Acclaim
description: A great sword of recognition, forged by the gods for the champions of humankind.

name: Divine Flail
description: Gifted from the heavens to the most righteous of mortals, these flails have been imbued with the power of angels to subjugate evil entities.

name: Sword of Splendor
description: An exalted weapon of the august kings of old, hallowed with the spirit of nations and yearning to grant power anew.

name: Gravelord's Flail
description: The primary armament of the gravelords of old, eternally tasked with making sure the dead are forever sealed away from the mortal plane.

name: Sword of Majesty
description: A gleaming obsidian sword of imperial power, fashioned by enslaved demons for the personal use of a world-conquering leader of mortals.

name: Acidic Slasher
description: Steeped in the acid rainwater of Forax, the chemical coating has transformed this already mighty blade into a heavy-hitting weapon of war.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Acidic Slasher Shiny
description: Steeped in the acid rainwater of Forax, the chemical coating has transformed this already mighty blade into a heavy-hitting weapon of war.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Ancient Stone Sword
description: A slow but powerful sword that is a relic of a long forgotten age.

name: Ancient Stone Sword Shiny
description: A slow but powerful sword that is a relic of a long forgotten age.

name: Arcane Rapier
description: This sword's blade is infused with magical essence, causing it to fire out violently upon lunging. That same magical force pulls the blade back to its hilt after striking.

name: Arcane Rapier Shiny
description: This sword's blade is infused with magical essence, causing it to fire out violently upon lunging. That same magical force pulls the blade back to its hilt after striking.

name: Atavistic Soul Sabre
description: An unbearably heavy sword said to harness the soul of a Kogboldian master craftsman.

name: Atavistic Soul Sabre Shiny
description: An unbearably heavy sword said to harness the soul of a Kogboldian master craftsman.

name: Barnacle Basher
description: An extraordinarily dense silversteel anchor attached to a magical kelpwoven chain. Whatever ship it was attached to has long since been dragged to the depths.

name: Barnacle Basher Shiny
description: An extraordinarily dense silversteel anchor attached to a magical kelpwoven chain. Whatever ship it was attached to has long since been dragged to the depths.

name: Crystal Sword
description: A lightweight blade that seems to dance in your hands.

name: Crystal Sword Shiny
description: A lightweight blade that seems to dance in your hands.

name: 2KnightST0
description: Elite Viking warriors and guards were given these great battle axes to use in combat. The mighty Dalvar, strongest of all the Vikings, was known to cut through enemy defenses with this finely balanced weapon.

name: Damnation
description: An uncannily heavy iron ball and chain utilized by Murcian himself, burdened by the weight of countless souls that met their fate at the hands of the warden.

name: Damnation Shiny
description: An uncannily heavy iron ball and chain utilized by Murcian himself, burdened by the weight of countless souls that met their fate at the hands of the warden.

name: Def Test Flail
description: The primary armament of the gravelords of old, eternally tasked with making sure the dead are forever sealed away from the mortal plane.

name: Demon Blade
description: A swift and hungry blade that is never satisfied with just one kill.

name: Demon Blade Shiny
description: A swift and hungry blade that is never satisfied with just one kill.

name: Divinity
description: The chosen blade of Oryx the Mad God, charged with an unrelenting energy to subdue all that lies before it.

name: Divinity Shiny
description: The chosen blade of Oryx the Mad God, charged with an unrelenting energy to subdue all that lies before it.

name: Excubicur
description: The Legendary Sword of the Cube God, is a blade of unparalleled power, forged from the essence of the almighty Cube God itself.

name: 2PaladinST0
description: This cryptic blade has been forged from belligerent energies of the great beyond. Wielding it twists mortal comprehension of right and wrong.

name: FFabulous FFlail
description: After years of tinkering with the algorithms, Null created a deadlier replica of the MMace MMurderer to create the FFabulous FFlail. A MMace that can be MMasterfully FFlung, FFrequently FFlying FFabulously albeit with slight miscalculations.

name: 3KnightST0
description: Unleash destruction with this brutal flail. Its massive anvil end shatters armor and crushes foes. Its craftsmanship whispers of an untamed, cataclysmic force.

name: Gaseous Glaive
description: One of the most unusual feats of Katalonian engineering. This barely tangible sword hurls puffs of toxic gas, if you can manage to firmly grasp it.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Gaseous Glaive Shiny
description: One of the most unusual feats of Katalonian engineering. This barely tangible sword hurls puffs of toxic gas, if you can manage to firmly grasp it.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: 3PaladinST0
description: The harbinger will tread through the Tundra, uncaring of the life that may have ended at the hands of the deepsteel blade.

name: Henchman's Claymore
description: A brutally heavy sword designed to make those at the other end of its blade know their place.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: WarriorST0
description: All initiates who start the path of becoming a Dragon Tamer are given a special weapon. If an initiate completes the Path alive, this weapon is given a name by the Elders.

name: 3WarriorST0
description: The edge has been made blunt and ragged from smashing into trees, doors, walls, and pesky hikers.

name: Lovestruck Yoyo
description: Every swing of this weapon leaves enemies becoming less and less aggressive thanks to this toys magical properties (and being hit in the head multiple times).

name: MMace MMurderer
description: A heavy mace that abides only by the power of repetition.

name: KnightST0
description: Forged eons ago in the fires of Shaitan's domain, this infamous blade has cut down countless mighty heroes throughout the ages.

name: Pirate King's Cutlass
description: Used only by the pirates who would make themselves kings, this cutlass is said to be cursed as each Pirate King seems to be killed rather unexpectedly.

name: Pirate King's Cutlass Shiny
description: Used only by the pirates who would make themselves kings, this cutlass is said to be cursed as each Pirate King seems to be killed rather unexpectedly.

name: Pirate's Artillery
description: Although cannons were once typically associated with naval warfare, many pirates now regard Bilgewater's application of them in land-based combat as revolutionary.

name: PaladinST0
description: Pixies are often a more aggressive fae. It makes great sense that they would provide heroes with swords as fine as this.

name: Sword of Light
description: This ghastly blade has the power to emit waves of energy that dance like wraiths in the dark.

name: Sword of Light Shiny
description: This ghastly blade has the power to emit waves of energy that dance like wraiths in the dark.

name: 2WarriorST0
description: A clumsy yet vicious weapon favored by marauders from coast to coast. Only an experienced pirate king can perform the techniques required to unlock its full potential.

name: Sword of Illumination
description: A sword that, when held by one true of heart, will release magic from the flawless ruby in its hilt and ignite in flames.

name: Sword of the Colossus
description: A sword with an impossibly sharp edge. It has been designed with holy magic to slash like no other blade.

name: Sword of the Colossus Shiny
description: A sword with an impossibly sharp edge. It has been designed with holy magic to slash like no other blade.

name: Sword of the Colossus Shiny New
description: A sword with an impossibly sharp edge. It has been designed with holy magic to slash like no other blade.

name: Vinesword
description: Strung together with the deadly vines of Belladonna.

name: Force Wand
description: A wand that emits bolts of pure force.

name: Power Wand
description: A wand that fires power bolts.

name: Missile Wand
description: A wand that casts a strong missile.

name: Eldritch Wand
description: A wand that shoots dark eldritch energy.

name: Hell's Fire Wand
description: A wand that casts a strong fire spell.

name: Wand of Dark Magic
description: A wand that casts a bolt of pure magic force.

name: Morning Star of Mystic Light
description: A morningstar that channels blinding light.

name: Wand of Arcane Flame
description: A deadly wand that channels magefire from the nether planes.

name: Morning Star of Silent Mourning
description: A morning star used  by followers of Osiris to guide spirits through the Duat.

name: Wand of Death
description: A fearsome wand that fires bolts of penetrating death magic.

name: Morning Star of Hidden Secrets
description: A morning star unlike any other with power of an unknown origin.

name: Wand of Deep Sorcery
description: A mysterious wand of otherworldly origin, imbued with the purest of arcane energies.

name: Morning Star of the Night
description: A morning star used by missionaries to travel safely across the realms.

name: Wand of Shadow
description: A wand of demonic enigmas, cloaked in darkness and crackling with dark enchantments.

name: Morning Star of Harrowing Memories
description: A terrifying morning star said to cause the user to relive their worst memories.

name: Wand of Ancient Warning
description: A centuries-old wand of great power, heralding long-destined destruction.

name: Morning Star of Repentance
description: An otherworldly gilded morningstar, used by bishops to rid the world of sin.

name: Wand of Recompense
description: A great golden wand of the heavens, created by angels to wreak justice on the slayers of the innocent.

name: Morning Star of Conjuration
description: A glistening golden morningstar of faith, used by Daevite summoners to protect their kingdom from the void.

name: Wand of Evocation
description: A shining gold wand of force, built by a diabolic archmagus to channel vast corrupting energies into the material plane.

name: Morning Star of Reckoning
description: A golden morning star of unrelenting power, created for the sole purpose of the destruction.

name: Wand of Retribution
description: A golden wand of breathtaking power, created by elemental forces from the realms of ice and flame to unleash revenge on their enemies.

name: SorcererST0
description: Although destroyed, the beast's brute strength remains deeply embedded in this odd wand. Its rage possesses you, and lends you its force.

name: Beekeeper's Flamethrower
description: Equipped with a mechanical combustion technology few may understand, this weapon projects flames boasting temperatures capable of melting their target before they're able to retaliate.

name: Beekeeper's Flamethrower Shiny
description: Equipped with a mechanical combustion technology few may understand, this weapon projects flames boasting temperatures capable of melting their target before they're able to retaliate.

name: SummonerST0
description: A highly versatile tool modified from what was once just a vial holder. It can extend and retract, tighten for wrench functions, and shoot energy blasts. All the usual tools of science!

name: Caduceus of Current Craziness
description: The harbinger of past pandemonium, current craziness, and future fatuity. It just can't seem to stay focused.

name: Caduceus Of Enlightened Chaos
description: After years of tinkering with the algorithms, Null created a deadlier replica of the Caduceus of Current Craziness to create the Caduceus Of Enlightened Chaos. Using this wand allows the user to reach their full chaotic potential and understand their role in battle; be unpredictable and let someone else deal with it.

name: 3PriestST0
description: A short cane adorned with an ornamental golden tip, used to poke and prod at those who had passed - and those who were soon to join them...

name: Conducting Wand
description: This wand is powerful at conducting magical energy into a devastating blast.

name: Conducting Wand Shiny
description: This wand is powerful at conducting magical energy into a devastating blast.

name: Crystal Wand
description: A sound almost like a wind chime emanates softly from this wand.

name: Crystal Wand Shiny
description: A sound almost like a wind chime emanates softly from this wand.

name: Deliverance
description: A much more refined cane than its predecessor, imbued with unwilling spirits that lost their way towards the afterlife.

name: Deliverance Shiny
description: A much more refined cane than its predecessor, imbued with unwilling spirits that lost their way towards the afterlife.

name: Dusky Catalyst
description: An untempered casting wand brought forth to tap into distant powers, but an imbalance rendered it too unreliable for most to dare use.

name: Dusky Catalyst Shiny
description: An untempered casting wand brought forth to tap into distant powers, but an imbalance rendered it too unreliable for most to dare use.

name: 2SummonerST0
description: Strictly speaking, this is no wand at all, and rather blunt even for a channeling device. Yet its crude appearance belies a sophisticated tool of deterrence, a contrast very much in character for the spirits of the earth.

name: Fortitude
description: The wand is able to conjure mighty encircling defenses. Given enough time, it is capable of instantly establishing fortifications.

name: DruidST0
description: A precision-engineered morning star mimicking a raptor’s strike.

name: Laser Pointer
description: Early prototype versions of the KI470 Laser pointing device came with no inbuilt limiter on their power output. First batch testing resulted in many schematics cut clean in half, as well as multiple layers of steel wall.

name: Laser Pointer Shiny
description: Early prototype versions of the KI470 Laser pointing device came with no inbuilt limiter on their power output. First batch testing resulted in many schematics cut clean in half, as well as multiple layers of steel wall.

name: 3SorcererST0
description: Unleash the untamed forces of electricity! This rod's damage output is as unpredictable as a storm, striking foes with bolts that range from a spark to a lightning blast.

name: Lumiaire
description: This ceremonial mace controls the forces of light and darkness. Archbishop Leucoryx uses it for distinguished offerings in the name of his god.

name: Lumiaire Shiny
description: This ceremonial mace controls the forces of light and darkness. Archbishop Leucoryx uses it for distinguished offerings in the name of his god.

name: 2SorcererST0
description: The classic kit of a magician, built to both dazzle and destroy one's enemies.

name: Morning Square
description: A strange bludgeoning weapon known for leaving extreme wounds on enemies with its perfect ninety degree angles.

name: Morning Star Of Sweet Miracles
description: Containing the power of pure heart and innocence, this morning star seeks to return compassion to the corrupted.

name: 3SummonerST0
description: The branch of a great nettle tree whose poisonous razor barbs project under stress to ward off creatures. Channeling magic revitalizes it's thorns as soon as they are fired.

name: Snowblind Wand
description: A wand held together by an ice crystal extracted from the depths of Untaris. Each shot possesses the concentrated force of a blizzard.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Snowblind Wand Shiny
description: A wand held together by an ice crystal extracted from the depths of Untaris. Each shot possesses the concentrated force of a blizzard.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Soul's Guidance
description: A crude walking stick enchanted by Skuld's distinct style of sorcery, constructed to guide fallen spirits to the afterlife.

name: Soul's Guidance Shiny
description: A crude walking stick enchanted by Skuld's distinct style of sorcery, constructed to guide fallen spirits to the afterlife.

name: Sprite Wand
description: A wand created from the wood of Sprite trees. Seems to be poorly calibrated, though.

name: Sprite Wand Shiny
description: A wand created from the wood of Sprite trees. Seems to be poorly calibrated, though.

name: St. Abraham's Wand
description: A wand made from a brilliant white cross designed to ward off evil.

name: St. Abraham's Wand Shiny
description: A wand made from a brilliant white cross designed to ward off evil.

name: 2PriestST0
description: Oryx's so-called priests use cruel wands like this to inflict suffering on their recipients. They themselves must endure this pain to begin the path to consecration.

name: Tyrant's Wand
description: Granted only to the highest ranking mages of Oryx's legion, this wand conjures pagan magic forbidden by most practitioners.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Wand of Budding Romance
description: Harnessing the unusual power of Belladonna's flowers, these shots are beautiful but deadly!

name: PriestST0
description: Despite their normal pacificity, priests of Geb were able to protect themselves from aggressors.

name: Wand of Hidden Knowledge
description: Legend has it that this wand was written into existence by a book that wrote itself.

name: Wand of Hidden Knowledge Shiny
description: Legend has it that this wand was written into existence by a book that wrote itself.

name: Wand of the Bulwark
description: This strange weapon was used by ancient battle mages to deter invaders. The secret to its construction has long been lost.

name: Wand of the Bulwark Shiny
description: This strange weapon was used by ancient battle mages to deter invaders. The secret to its construction has long been lost.

name: Wand of the Fallen
description: Made from a cherry tree branch. This wand was gifted by Xil to Daichi for bringing him into this world.

name: Wand of the Fallen Shiny
description: Made from a cherry tree branch. This wand was gifted by Xil to Daichi for bringing him into this world.

name: Warlord Wand
description: An accomplished alien conquerer brandished this wand as a show of might, topping it with a gemstone from each planet he overthrew.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum

name: Warlord Wand Shiny
description: An accomplished alien conquerer brandished this wand as a show of might, topping it with a gemstone from each planet he overthrew.\n\nSprite Credits: Aurum
